passages.name: Special Thanks.
passages.content:
<<back>>

I want to thank all the people who have been such a help and inspiration to me as I've worked on this, and other projects.

Thank you to all my fans.  Without you, I'd quickly lose all motivation and will to work on this kind of project.  

Thank you to everyone over in the twine help thread on TFGamesSite.com  You are all very willing to help, while asking nothing in return.  You guys are absolutely wonderful.

A very special thanks to TheMadExile and Greyelf from TFGamesSite.com for always being willing to help out with coding issues that arise. (Hell, who am I kidding?  I'd be completely lost without them.)  Both show an amazing amount of patience with me as they create the impossible things I request and teach me how to duplicate their amazing feats on my own.  Thank you guys!

Thank you to Rfpnj from TFGamesSite.com for always being around to help out, whether it be through testing, double checking code, and often offering solutions to problems we encounter along the way.

Thank you to a bunch of everyone who had helped out with bug reports and in other little ways.  I appreciate every single one of you, each of you have helped make this game as good as it is.  There are far too many of you to list individually here, but a couple of you deserve special recognition for the work they have done.
* NightHawk8P (For countless hours working on the Wiki, assisting with coding submitted scenes, countless spelling and grammar fixes.)
* scorpio111193 (For helping out with the Wiki.)


Thank you to our very talented artists for making the visuals you see in the game possible.  
Current Artists:
* DarklyWhite
* Ezhaillia

Thank you to Grim8P for all their help with the wiki.

On occasion, someone will go above and beyond, pledging a staggering amount to help out.  At the $100 level these people make a huge difference.  All I can say at this level is that "Thank You" does not seem adequate to express my gratitude, even if they are the only words to do so.  So than
passages.content_zh:
<<返回>>

我要感謝所有在我從事這個專案和其他專案時給予我如此幫助和啟發的人。

感謝我所有的粉絲。  沒有你，我很快就會失去從事此類專案的所有動力和意願。  

感謝 TFGamesSite.com 上的 twine 幫助線程中的所有人，你們都非常願意提供幫助，而不求任何回報。  你們真是太棒了。

passages.name: First Quest 5a
passages.content:
Every footstep draws him deeper into the cave.  His eyes drifting over the freshly dug tunnels.  Silently, he moves down the tunnel, each step calculated to not make a sound.  

In the near perfect dark, Ra finds himself moving slowly.  It's not until he can see a light from somewhere ahead that he stops.  He remains still for several seconds, straining to hear or see anything that may indicate what he is about to walk into, //It's too late to back out now.  I've already come this far.//

Steeling his resolve, he begins to walk again.  He can see the cave beginning to open up.  He can see a large opening ahead at almost exactly the same time that he can hear soft chanting.  

Ra is careful to stay in the shadows, wanting to see what he must confront before actually needing to confront it.  

First he sees some form of altar, two ghouls and perhaps half a dozen humans garbed in deep red robes.  All around them are torches on the walls and brazers lighting the middle.  In almost perfect unison, every one of their heads turn toward him.  

He feels a chill go through him, though it has nothing to do with cool air in these tunnels.  "Come inside,"  A voice like honey flavored with humor fills the air, "You've sought out my sanctum, do introduce yourself."

//Ya Khara!//  Ra thinks in a panic, //It knows I am here.  I am doomed.//

Even though the thoughts threaten to consume him with hopelessness, he forces himself to move, his footsteps leading him into the room, //I will not die without a fight,//  The thought lingers in his mind.

Ra's eyes drift over the room, trying to take everything in, searching for anything he might be able to use to his advantage.

When he sees the throne, he at first thinks it is empty, but then he notices the shadow, or rather the //darkness// within the seat.  The darkness in the seat seems to have a human shape, but no real substance.  Looking at it is like looking upon the night sky, a blanket of faint stars against an infinite void, and
passages.content_zh:
每一步都將他帶向洞穴的更深處。  他的目光掃過新挖的隧道。  他默默地沿著隧道走下去，每一步都盡量不發出聲音。  

在近乎完美的黑暗中，拉發現自己移動緩慢。  直到他看到前方某處有光亮，他才停下來。  他一動不動地呆了幾秒鐘，竭盡全力地聽或看任何可能表明他即將走進的東西，//現在退出已經太晚了。  我已經走到這一步了//

他下定決心，再次開始走路。  他可以看到洞穴開始敞開。  他幾乎可以同時聽到前方有一個大開口，同時還可以聽到輕柔的吟唱聲。  

拉小心翼翼地待在陰影中，想在真正需要面對之前先看看他必須面對什麼。  

首先，他看到了某種祭壇、兩個食屍鬼，或許還有六名穿著深紅色長袍的人類。  他們周圍的牆上掛著火把，中間的火把照亮了他們。  他們幾乎一致地把頭轉向他。  

他感到一陣寒意襲遍全身，儘管這與隧道裡的涼爽空氣無關。  “進來吧，”空氣中充滿了蜂蜜般幽默的聲音，“你已經找到了我的聖所，請自我介紹一下。”

//Ya Khara！ // Ra 驚慌地想，//它知道我在這裡。  我注定了。 //

儘管這些想法威脅著他的絕望，他還是強迫自己移動，他的腳步引導著他走進房間，//我不會不戰而死，//這個想法在他的腦海中揮之不去。

拉的目光掃過房間，試著把一切都看進去，尋找任何他可以利用的東西。

當他看到王座時，他首先認為它是空的，但隨後他注意到座位內的陰影，或者更確切地說是//黑暗//。  座位上的黑暗似乎有一個人的形狀，但沒有真正的實質。  看著它就像看著夜空，一片微弱的星星映襯著無限的虛空，

passages.name: Transformations
passages.content:
<<back>>

<<if $Anubis is "true">>!Anubis (Dog) Transformation:
The Anubis transformation grants Ra an extraordinary sense of smell and enhances his strength to a small degree.

<</if>><<if $Bakuvac is "true">>!Bakuvac (Abomination) Transformation:
The Bakucac transformation is both Ra's salvation and his undoing.  In the involuntary act of taking on this creature's DNA, he was able to close a rift, destroy the Bakuvac, and become tainted by the Great Old Ones' corruption.  This form grants him greater strength than any other transformation available to him, but it's use will accelerate his own end.

<</if>><<if $Bastet is "true">>!Bastet (Cat) Transformation:
The Bastet transformation grants Ra better vision at night and incredible agility.

<</if>><<if $Hathor is "true">>!Hathor (Cow) Transformation:
The Hathor transformation, while intended as humor on Ra's part, is still useful for it's pure brute strength.

<</if>><<if $Horus is "true">>!Horus (Falcon) Transformation:
The Horus transformation grants Ra keen sight and flight.

<</if>><<if $Sobek is "true">>!Sobek (Crocodile) Transformation:
The Sobek transformation grants Ra thick armored hide and incredible strength as well as greater mobility in the water.

<</if>><<back>>
passages.content_zh:
<<返回>>

<<如果 $Anubis 為「true」>>！ Anubis（狗）變換：
阿努比斯變身賦予了拉非凡的嗅覺，並小幅增強了他的力量。

<</if>><<如果 $Bakuvac 為「true」>>！ Bakuvac（憎惡）轉換：
巴庫卡克的轉變既是拉的救贖，也是他的毀滅。  在不自覺地接受了這個生物的 DNA 的過程中，他能夠閉合裂縫，摧毀巴庫瓦克，並被舊日支配者的腐化所污染。  這種形態賦予他比其他可用的變形更強大的力量，但它的使用會加速他自己的結局。

<</if>><<if $Bastet is "true">>!Bastet（貓）轉換：
Bastet 的轉變賦予 Ra 更好的夜間視力和令人難以置信的敏捷性。

<</if>><<if $Hathor is "true">>!Hathor (Cow) 轉換：
哈索爾的轉變雖然是拉的幽默，但仍然有用，因為它純粹的蠻力。

<</if>><<if $Horus is "true">>!荷魯斯（獵鷹）變換：
荷魯斯的轉變賦予了拉敏銳的視力和飛行能力。

<</if>><<if $Sobek is "true">>!Sobek（鱷魚）轉換：
索貝克的轉變賦予了拉厚重的裝甲皮和令人難以置信的力量以及在水中更大的機動性。

<</如果>><<返回>>

passages.name: Travel to the Oasis.
passages.content:
The oasis, the same one Ra had crashed the Atet into when he first arrived on this planet, lies sprawled across the sands.  There are still signs of broken trees and torn ground, but there are already signs that the oasis is healing.

//I wonder if my home world is still capable of healing like this?  After everything that happened there, . . . //The thought trails off as his mind drifts to all that he lost.

//Funny really, this place is nothing like my home, the colors, the plants, completely alien to me.  Yet somehow this one scar, this place where I first placed my feet on the ground, it reminds me of my home.//

[img[Oasis]]

<<set $random to random(1,8)>><<if $random lte 2>>Thinking of the falcon he first encountered in the little oasis, Ra allows his body to draw upon the stored DNA from that creature.  

A sound, much like a sigh but with a hint of discomfort expels from his lips as the changes begin.  

His face narrows, drawing forth to become a beak as Ra goes to one knee.  The rest of his body contorts and pulls in on itself as his mass forces itself into a much smaller form.  Crinking his neck to one side, then to the other, feathers spread across his body like a wildfire racing across a field of dry grass.  Then he is finished, a slightly larger than average falcon stands where Ra was just moments before.  

Parting his beak, he makes a soft sound, then springs into the air.  His wings spread wide, catching the air as he propels himself higher.  

Within moments, he's high above the oasis, looking down.  His keen eyes search the space beneath him, instinctively seeking out the movement of small animals.  He circles, looking over the oasis and letting his avian gaze linger on the broken trees and ridges in the sands where the Atet had made it's rough landing. 

He savors the feeling of the wind beneath his wings, feeling like he is floating upon the expanse beneath him.

Idly, he wonders what became of the falcon he encountered after first arriving on t
passages.content_zh:
這片綠洲，就是拉第一次到達這個星球時，阿泰特撞上的那片綠洲，遍布在沙灘上。  仍然有樹木折斷和地面撕裂的跡象，但已經有跡象表明綠洲正在癒合。

//不知道我的家鄉還有這樣的療癒能力嗎？  在那裡發生了一切之後，. 。 。 //當他的思緒飄向他失去的一切時，這個想法逐漸消失。

//真的很有趣，這個地方和我的家一點也不像，這裡的顏色、植物對我來說完全陌生。  然而不知何故，這道傷疤，這個我第一次把腳放在地上的地方，讓我想起了我的家。 //

[img[綠洲]]

<<set $random to random(1,8)>><<if $random lte 2>>想起他在小綠洲中第一次遇到的獵鷹，Ra 讓他的身體利用該生物儲存的 DNA。  

當變化開始時，他的嘴唇發出一種很像嘆息但帶著一絲不適的聲音。  

當拉單膝跪下時，他的臉變窄了，變成了一張喙。  當他的質量迫使自己變得更小的形式時，他身體的其餘部分扭曲並自我拉扯。  他的脖子向一側彎曲，然後又向另一側彎曲，羽毛遍布他的全身，就像野火在乾草場上奔跑一樣。  然後他就完成了，一隻比一般獵鷹稍大一些的獵鷹站在拉剛才所在的地方。  

他張開喙，發出一聲輕柔的聲音，然後跳到空中。  他的翅膀張開，抓住空氣，將自己推得更高。  

不一會兒，他就站在了綠洲的高處，俯視著下方。  他敏銳的目光搜索著身下的空間，本能地尋找小動物的動靜。  他盤旋著，俯瞰著綠洲，讓他的鳥眼凝視著阿特號艱難著陸的斷樹和沙脊。 

他享受著翅膀下風的感覺，感覺自己漂浮在腳下的廣闊空間。

他無所事事地想知道他第一次到達地球後遇到的獵鷹怎麼樣了。

passages.name: Join Hathor for a date.
passages.content:
"Cecherveni,"  Ra says with a sad sort of smile.

Hathor looks at him, her expression quizzical, "Is that a yes?"

"It is,"  Ra admits.

The smile that forms on Hathor's face reaches her eyes, causing an inner joy to shine through, "Give me just a little while, I need to prepare."

Ra doesn't have time to inquire further before she is gone.  Instead, he shifts his attention to the Atet's consoles, tapping a few keys to bring up an image of this world.  //I've done so much.  These people have done so much.//  He sighs heavily, //But will it be enough?//

He isn't sure how long he looks at the globe, studying it, before he feels a light touch against the small of his back, "Trouble?"  Hathor's voice is soft near his ear.

Snapping from his reprieve, Ra quickly turns turns off the display, "Just reflecting on the past, wondering what the future might hold,"  His words remind him of the corruption coursing through his veins, //A future where I will have no place.//

"Your future holds a day without worries,"  Hathor says with a smile, either failing to notice, or choosing to ignore, Ra's somber thoughts.

[[Continue.|PicnicStart]]
passages.content_zh:
「切切維尼，」拉帶著悲傷的微笑說。

哈索爾看著他，表情疑惑，“這是肯定的嗎？”

「是的，」Ra 承認。

哈索爾臉上的笑容到達了她的眼眸，讓內心的喜悅綻放出來，“給我一點時間，我需要準備一下。”

在她離開之前，拉沒有時間進一步詢問。  相反，他將注意力轉移到 Atet 的控制台上，敲擊幾個按鍵以顯示這個世界的圖像。  //我已經做了很多了。  這些人做了這麼多。 //他重重地嘆了口氣，//但這就夠了嗎？ //

他不確定自己盯著地球儀看了多久，研究了它，然後他的腰部感覺到了輕輕的觸碰，「有麻煩嗎？」哈索爾的聲音在他耳邊輕柔。

拉從緩刑中恢復過來，迅速關掉了顯示器，「只是反思過去，想知道未來會怎樣。」他的話讓他想起了血管中流淌的腐敗，//一個我將沒有立足之地的未來。 //

「你的未來將迎來無憂無慮的一天，」哈索爾微笑著說道，要么沒有註意到，要么選擇忽視拉的憂鬱想法。

[[繼續。 |野餐開始]]

passages.name: Quest7Path3
passages.content:
Frantically, panic threatening to overwhelm him, Ra searches his surroundings for anything that might help.  His eyes dart over Zal'chaas and Nyarlathotep, the walls shrouded in deep siwrling shadows, the massive round stone with the flat top that dominates the center of the room, the faintly glowing runes at the far side of the room, the rocky ground with bones strewn through the dirt and stones, . .  

Ra's eyes snap back to the runes, not sure what he's going to do yet, but already in motion as he darts toward the glow.  He barely has time to take a full step before the runes seem to loom around him, the air itself shimmering as it reaches to embrace him.

Several things happen at once.

Zal'chaas shrieks, words without form flaying Ra's mind with tendrils of madness that threaten to unravel everything that he is.

In sharp contrast to Zal'chaas' reaction, Nyarlathotep's laughter is filled with a joyful laughter that is every bit as unsettling as the cursed words echoing through his mind.

And at the very same instant, tentacles of darkness, blacker than the void between stars reach for him.  They grasp at him, their touch like liquid fire causing him to scream.  But they're a fraction of a second too late.  

One second to the next he finds himself standing in a different world.  He can not immediately identify the stench in the air, but it makes him blanch.  

The entire world seems to shudder and pulse and Ra knows deep down that Zal'chaas is as much a part of this place as the swirling fog that makes it nearly impossible to see more than a few feet in any direction.

Then there's something darker moving in the shadows, inky black causing the fog to swirl unnaturally.

Ra shoves off from the ground, taking the form of the falcon as he takes flight.  The air feels heavy and thick, like a faint resistance coming from every direciton at once.  But he simply pushes harder, fleeing what he fears is dogging his heels while searching for any escape.

When Zal'chass'
passages.content_zh:
拉瘋狂地搜尋周圍環境，尋找任何可能有幫助的東西。  他的目光掃過扎爾查斯和奈亞拉托提普，牆壁籠罩在深沉的漩渦陰影中，巨大的平頂圓石佔據了房間的中央，房間的另一邊隱約發光的符文，岩石地面上的泥土和石頭中散落著骨頭，…… 。  

拉的眼睛猛地回到符文上，還不知道自己要做什麼，但當他衝向光芒時，他已經開始行動了。  他還來不及邁出完整的一步，符文就似乎在他周圍若隱若現，空氣在擁抱他時閃閃發光。

幾件事同時發生。

札爾查斯尖聲尖叫，無形的話語用瘋狂的捲鬚掠過拉的心靈，威脅著要解開他的一切。

與札爾查斯的反應形成鮮明對比的是，奈亞拉托提普的笑聲中充滿了歡樂的笑聲，和腦海中迴響的詛咒話語一樣令人不安。

就在同一瞬間，比星辰之間的虛空還要黑的黑暗觸手向他襲來。  他們抓住了他，他們的觸碰像液體火焰一樣讓他尖叫起來。  但他們晚了幾分之一秒。  

下一秒他發現自己站在一個不同的世界。  他無法立即辨別出空氣中的惡臭，但卻讓他臉色發白。  

整個世界似乎都在顫抖和脈動，而拉內心深處知道，扎爾查斯就像漩渦迷霧一樣是這個地方的一部分，使得任何方向都幾乎看不到幾英尺之外的東西。

然後陰影裡有一些更暗的東西在移動，漆黑的顏色導致霧氣不自然地旋轉。

拉從地面上推開，在飛行時化身為獵鷹。  空氣感覺沉重而黏稠，彷彿有一股微弱的阻力同時從四面八方傳來。  但他只是更加努力地推動，逃離他所擔心的在尋找任何逃生機會時緊隨其後的東西。

當扎爾'查斯'

passages.name: Quest7Path2
passages.content:
Ra feels something snap inside of himself, terror overwhelming everything else.  In the blink of an eye, he's running as fast as his feet can carry him.  He makes it less than a dozen strides before he reaches within himself for the falcon genetic code he obtained when he first arrived on this planet.

In less than a second, he's flying, propelling himself away  with every ounce of strength.

Then the light at the end of the cave, where it opens up into the rest of the world, goes dark, engulfing Ra in blackness so dark it feels as if it pulls at his very soul.

Ra slams into something solid, , stunning him.  Then there's movement in the darkness, black sliding over black.  Something soft, like a lover's breath dances across his skin, at the same time he feels as if electricity courses through the touch like a livewire cooking flesh.

He screams, his body shifting back to it's natural form in the darkness.  Another touch, and another.  Dozens of formless tentacles spawned of the darkness around him reach out, touching him, grasping at him

//Consider me surprised,//  Nyarlathotep's voice whispers in Ra's mind, //I expected you to die trying to betray our deal, to die fighting, . . . turning craven was not among my plans.//

Ra screams again, his throat feeling like razor blades shredding the flesh of his throat and mouth, as the pale feminine form moves through the darkness.  

//Zal'chaas,//  Her wordless beckoning fills his mind.

//Perhaps I'll play with this world again the next time life evolves.//  And with that echoing thought, Nyarlathotep's presence is gone, leaving Ra utterly alone with this other creature.  

The harbinger of the end had come.

[[Epilogue.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉感覺內心有東西崩塌了，恐懼壓倒了一切。  眨眼之間，他就以雙腳所能承受的最快速度奔跑了。  他走了不到十幾步，就在體內找到了他第一次來到這個星球時獲得的獵鷹遺傳密碼。

passages.name: Q4Scout
passages.content:
The sun is high in the sky when he finally sees the blight.  Feeling elated, he calls out in happiness, the shrill cry of the falcon he resembles fills the air around  him, the sound carrying for miles.  

Angling toward the place he sees, he starts to take note of the details.

Nested between two mountains is a small valley, at it's center is a small lake with water that seems too dark, and all around it are trees and plant life that has taken on a sickly color.

Gliding over the site, Ra circles, his keen avian eyes taking in the black water and dying plants, but seeing no signs of life anywhere.

//It doesn't look like a large area, it's location seems to have contained the blight for the time being, but it's only served to compress the corruption into a smaller area,//  Tilting his wings, he dips in the air momentarily before flapping his wings to rise higher, //I can try to scorch the area with the Atet, but if there's anything down there that can damage the ship that might be a fatal decision.  Maybe I should go down there and look around, try to figure out what I'm dealing with before I decide the best course of action?//

Ra bursts out of the cave, a the darkness of night accompanied by clouds drapes everything in blackness.  If not for the rain striking his flesh and the faint lights coming from a small number of the nearby buildings, he wouldn't have even known he was outside.  //I wasn't down there for long, how can the sun set in only a couple of hours?//  The one thought crosses his panicked mind.

他的目光一刻也沒有離開眼前的生物。

它不像他以前見過的那樣帶有病態的藍色調，相反，考慮到它的人類起源，它的皮膚是蒼白的灰色。  很容易就比拉高了一個頭和肩膀，而且他比他生活在其中的大多數人類都高，這個生物至少可以說是令人印象深刻的。  它的手和腳被拉伸得不可思議的長，變成了長長的黑色爪子，他知道如果完全抓到的話可能會將他劈成兩半。  肋骨和骨頭似乎到處突出，使該生物看起來幾乎是骷髏。  它的腹股溝處懸掛著一根鬆弛的陰莖，幾乎與大腿一樣長，幾乎達到了膝蓋。  但最讓人不安的還是臉。  雖然身體其他部位的形狀很像人類，但臉部卻一點也不像。

它的臉很長，形狀比拉熟悉的任何東西都更像狗。  鋒利的鋸齒狀牙齒填滿了一張幾乎無法閉合的嘴巴。  張開的鼻孔位於嘴唇之上，嘴唇似乎被剝落，露出了毫無血色的粉紅色牙齦。  長而尖的耳朵向後貼在頭骨上，彷彿無法完全獨立站立。

passages.name: Q4D1
passages.content:
Tilting his wings again, Ra allows himself to fall into a gradual dive, circling as he looses altitude.  He revels in the feeling of the wind rushing around his body, the way it moves around his wings and across his feathers.  

//I hope that I never loose the wonder in this feeling of flight,//  He thinks before his mind starts to focus on the ground rushing to meet him.  Mere seconds from the ground, he spreads his wings wide and angles them to catch the air, his descent slowing with a thunderous sound as he approaches the ground, his taloned feet touching the ground right as he starts to change into his canine form. 

His body pushes outward, limbs thickening as feathers seem to vanish into his skin.  A throaty growl escapes his lips as he arches his back, pitching forward onto four limbs instead of two as thick dark hair bursts from his body in a rippling wave that starts near his middle and spreads in every direction.

When the change is complete, he lets his eyes scan his surroundings for any form of danger.  

Even though he doesn't see anything obvious, the hair on the back of his neck rises as he sniffs the air, //The corruption is heavy here, stronger than first impressions would suggest.//

passages.name: Changelog.
passages.content:
<<back>>

As of A12, Last Stand of Ra is a complete game.  Any further updates will involve bug fixes and/or polish as needed.

A12
* Added the final quest to the game.
* Added a new sex scene with Hathor involving the feline transformation.
* Added a new sex scene with Hathor where Ra transforms into, . . . . Hathor.  A little self love never hurt anyone?
*Added a new sex scene with Hathor that involves being VERY well endowed.
* Added two new items to the "Horrors" section of the sidebar that will unlock through game progression.
* Updated Special Thanks page 12/28/19.  If you think you belong on this list but your name isn't there, please let me know so I can get it fixed.
* Added around 5k words of content to the game bringing it's size up to about 77k words of content.


A11
* Added three scenes for the hermaphrodite prostitute in the temple district.
* Added an orgy scene for the prostitutes in the temple district.
* Added a new piece of art to the 4th quest of the game.
* Updated Special Thanks page 12/04/19.  If you think you belong on this list but your name isn't there, please let me know so I can get it fixed.
* Added around 4k words of content to the game bringing it's size up to about 72k words of content.
NOTE:  
This changelog is a little short.  The reason for this is that not all of the work done this week was added to the game.  The final quest of the game is going to be big, and since I don't expect to finish it in a week, I've opted instead to split my time between writing that and writing sex scenes.  This build and the next will likely be forused on sex scenes


A10
* Added the Bastet transformation for the final story of the fifth quest.
* Added the Sobek transformation for the final story of the fifth quest.
* Added a new event that takes place any time after the fifth quest is complete.  This adds the Hathor transformation.
* Added the main path through the sixth quest.
* Added the Anubis branch of the sixth quest.
* Added the Bastet branch
passages.content_zh:

A12

passages.name: Q2H1
passages.content:
Ra glides toward the ground, starting his transformation back to his natural form just before he reaches the ground.  Taloned claws become feet as his weight is placed on them, then upward as his body seems to burst upward.  Bit by bit the changes come over him, feathers being replaced by blue green skin.

As the last of his beak vanishes into his face, Ra flexes his jaw once, then turns his eyes to his surroundings.

His footsteps lead him inevitably toward the mound.  Every step he takes, he knows that it is a risk.  His eyes dart over the surrounding grounds for any sign of the Cthonians that clearly inhabit this area, //It's a small nest.  From the rot, I'd guess no more than two or three of them.  Maybe I'm lucky and they're hunting.//

No sooner has that thought crossed his mind that he hears the clatter of bones somewhere near the mound.  

Ra freezes in place, adrenaline coursing white hot through his veins.  //Maybe it wasn't one of them,//  He knows his thoughts are a lie even as he thinks them, //Or maybe it hasn't noticed me yet?//

The subtle movement of earth to his right is all the answer he needs.  Springing into motion, Ra runs toward the mound with every bit of speed he can manage.  

But his best is nowhere near enough.

The ground ripples as the Cthonian moves beneath it, surging toward him.  Then with a burst of dirt and rock, it emerges from the ground.  Perhaps twice as long as a man is tall, the creature hurls itself through the air, it's sickly purple skin somehow fitting of the rot that permeates the area.  Leading the way is a cluster of long pink tentacles, wicked looking white barbs lining their undersides.  Faster than Ra can blink. the tentacles lash out, grabbing him and pulling him toward the gaping maw at the tentacle cluster's maw.  At the same time a second Cthonian bursts from the ground, its own tentacles reaching for him and managing to grasp his head and one arm.

passages.name: Q6H1
passages.content:
Faster than any time he has ever transformed before, Ra forces the change.  Every inch of his body is engulfed in fiery white pain that fades nearly as fast as it starts.

The silence that follows is deafening, Nyarlathotep looking at Ra in surprise, while Ra just begins to realize that in his haste to take on any form to fight, he chose the form of a cow.

"Mooooo,"  The sound is long and mournful as it leaves his lips.  

"I have watched worlds form, civilizations rise and fall, I have seen things no creature on this planet could even comprehend,"  He laughs, "But I have never seen //anything// defend itself by becoming food."

In the seconds that follow, Ra's cow screams shake the very walls of the chamber.

END.



Or perhaps you would prefer to return to the Atet as if this never happened?

[[Return to the Atet.|Entering Sandbox.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉強制改變的速度比以往任何時候都快。  他身體的每一寸都被熾熱的白色疼痛所吞噬，這種疼痛幾乎和開始時一樣快地消失了。

接下來的沉默令人震耳欲聾，奈亞拉托提普驚訝地看著拉，而拉剛開始意識到，在他急於以任何形式戰鬥時，他選擇了牛的形式。

「嗚嗚嗚」從他唇邊發出的聲音悠長而悲傷。  

“我見過世界的形成，文明的興衰，我見過這個星球上任何生物都無法理解的東西，”他笑著說，“但我從未見過//任何東西//通過成為食物來保護自己。”

在接下來的幾秒鐘內，拉的牛叫聲震動了房間的牆壁。

結尾。



或者也許您更願意回到 Atet，就好像這件事從未發生過一樣？

[[返回Atet。 |進入沙盒。 ]]

passages.name: Epilogue.
passages.content:
In the days that followed, a shadow fell over the land.  Not a shadow like that cast by a cloud in the sky, but one that shades the soul and denies it warmth.  Every living thing could feel the change, as if the end was upon them and all knew that there was nothing that could stop it.

Most people tried to ignore the growing sense of dread, while others took their own lives for fear of what was to come.  Some however held on to hope, believing that the Sun God, Ra would save them.

As the days became weeks, dark things began to lurk in the shadows at night, Even with locked doors and brightly burning torches, people continued to finish, or were driven mad without warning.  Entire families would vanish from their beds in their sleep.  Or bodies would be strewn about in impossible patterns of gore.

With every passing day the despair became more palpable, until even Hathor began to fear that Ra would never return.

[[End.]]
passages.content_zh:
接下來的日子裡，陰影籠罩著大地。  不是像天空中的雲投下的陰影，而是遮蔽靈魂並剝奪其溫暖的陰影。  每一個生靈都能感受到這種變化，彷彿末日已經降臨，所有人都知道沒有什麼可以阻止。

大多數人試圖忽視日益增長的恐懼感，而另一些人則因為擔心即將發生的事情而結束了自己的生命。  然而，有些人仍抱持希望，相信太陽神拉會拯救他們。

隨著日子一天天過去，黑暗的東西開始潛伏在夜晚的陰影中，即使門鎖著，火把明亮地燃燒，人們仍然繼續完成，或者在沒有任何警告的情況下被逼瘋。  整個家庭都會在睡夢中從床上消失。  或者屍體會以不可思議的血腥圖案散佈在各處。

隨著時間一天天過去，絕望變得更加明顯，直到哈索爾也開始擔心拉永遠不會回來。

[[結尾。 ]]

passages.name: First Quest 3c1
passages.content:
This time, Ra draws on the DNA in a different way.  Instead of being in his natural form or in the form of the dog, he shifts into a blend of the two.  A soft whine leaves his lips as the pain of a second rapid transformation washes over him.  He pivots, his paws becoming more hand like but maintaining the the hard nails at the tips of his fingers.  

He pivots toward the sound, his arm coming around as he does so to catch the creature across the chest.  Wide bloodless furrows open on the ghoul's chest as Ra's claws rip him open.

The ghoul seems surprised, staggering back a step, but Ra pushes his advantage before it has a chance to call out to others.  One of Ra's hands swings at the ghoul's head, catching it by the ear and holding on.  He can see the ghoul's lips part in preparation for it's howl of pain, but Ra is too quick.  His other hand comes up and catches the thing by the jaw.  With all his strength he pulls with one hand while following through with the other.  

There's a crack, close to a 'pop' that comes from the thing's neck that is nearly drowned out by Ra's own grunt of exertion.

In the same second that the ghoul's neck breaks, it's body goes limp and falls to the ground in a heap.

Ra barely pays the creature any further thought, instead, he strains his ears, trying to listen for any further sign of trouble.

//Two ghouls, I was lucky,//  The reality of what just happened begins to sink in, Knowing that he's unlikely to repeat such an impressive feat twice, he crouches low and begins to move.  

He's half way around the cemetery when he hears a ghoul howl with it's deep gravely voice from near where he killed two already.  He hears two more answer the call, one so close to himself that he freezes in place.  

Ra can hear the one close to him start running toward the sound, though he doesn't see exactly where it was as it passes by somewhere close.

Holding his breath, he waits until he knows the creature is well past before he starts to move again
passages.content_zh:
這一次，Ra 以不同的方式利用 DNA。  他不再是自然形態或狗的形態，而是轉變為兩者的混合體。  當第二次快速轉變的痛苦席捲他時，他的嘴唇發出一聲輕柔的哀鳴。  他轉動身體，爪子變得更像手，但指尖仍保留著堅硬的指甲。  

他轉向聲音的方向，同時轉動手臂，抓住這個生物的胸口。  當拉的爪子將食屍鬼的胸口撕開時，他的胸膛上出現了寬闊的、沒有血色的皺紋。

食屍鬼似乎很驚訝，踉蹌地後退了一步，但拉在它有機會向其他人喊叫之前就擴大了優勢。  拉的一隻手向食屍鬼的頭部揮去，抓住它的耳朵並緊緊抓住。  他可以看到食屍鬼的嘴唇張開，準備發出痛苦的嚎叫，但拉太快了。  他的另一隻手抬起來，抓住了那東西的下巴。  他用盡全力用一隻手拉，另一手跟著。  

那東西的脖子上發出了一聲近乎「砰」的爆裂聲，幾乎被拉用力發出的咕嚕聲淹沒了。

就在食屍鬼脖子折斷的同一秒，它的身體變得軟綿綿的，摔倒在地。

拉幾乎沒有再多想這個生物，相反，他豎起耳朵，試圖聆聽任何進一步的麻煩跡象。

//兩個食屍鬼，我很幸運，//剛剛發生的事情的現實開始深入人心，知道他不太可能重複這樣令人印象深刻的壯舉兩次，他蹲下並開始移動。  

當他繞著墓地走了一半時，他聽到一聲食屍鬼的嚎叫，聲音低沉而嚴肅，來自他已經殺死了兩個人的地方。  他聽到另外兩個人接電話，其中一個離他太近了，他愣在了原地。  

拉可以聽到靠近他的人開始朝聲音跑去，儘管他並沒有看到聲音到底在哪裡，因為聲音從附近的某個地方經過。

他屏住呼吸，等到知道那個生物已經過去了才再次開始移動。

passages.name: AfterFirstSex
passages.content:
"No,"  The way she says is makes him question her sincerity, "It was just quicker than I had expected."

"These pleasures of the flesh, I have never felt such an intense physical sensation before in my life that did not involve pain.  Such pleasure is intoxicating and overwhelming,"  Ra admits.

Hathor reaches out, rubbing the nearly retracted penis with her fingertips.  It almost instantly begins to harden again, "Then perhaps it is practice that you need, so that you might bask in the pleasure rather than be consumed by it."

//Who am I do deny such an offer?//  He thinks, feeling mildly amused as he feels her coax him back to full hardness.

[[Three months later.]]<<set $RaCherry to "popped">>
passages.content_zh:
“不，”她說話的方式讓他質疑她的誠意，“只是比我預想的要快。”

「這些肉體的快樂，我一生中從未感受到如此強烈的身體感覺，而且不涉及疼痛。這種快樂是令人陶醉和壓倒性的，」Ra承認。

哈索爾伸出手，用指尖摩擦著幾乎縮回的陰莖。  它幾乎立刻又開始變硬，“那麼也許你需要的是練習，這樣你就可以沐浴在快樂中，而不是被它吞噬。”

//我是誰，竟然拒絕這樣的提議？ //他想，當他感覺到她把他哄回到完全冷漠時，他感到有點好笑。

[[三個月後。 ]]<<將 $RaCherry 設定為「popped」>>

passages.name: Speak of her people.
passages.content:
Ra sits on the small mountain of pillows across from Hathor.  For quite some time he listens to what she has to say.  Each word that leaves her mouth is committed to memory as Ra tries to learn everything he can about these strange people that he finds himself living among.

When the topic is exhausted, Ra thanks her and stands, considering his next destination.

[[Explore the City.]]
[[Visit the temples.]]
[[Oversee the Pyramid site.]]
[[Walk along the Nile.]]
[[Travel to the Oasis.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉坐在哈索爾對面的小山上。  很長一段時間他都在聽她說的話。  當拉試圖了解他發現自己生活在其中的這些奇怪的人的一切時，她嘴裡說出的每一個字都被牢牢記住。

當話題結束時，Ra 感謝她並站起來，考慮他的下一個目的地。

[[探索城市。 ]]
[[參觀寺廟。 ]]
[[監督金字塔站點。 ]]
[[沿著尼羅河漫步。 ]]
[[前往綠洲。 ]]

passages.name: Q6Part1
passages.content:
Several hours later, Ra finds himself leaning over Hathor, watching what she does, //She has a natural talent for piloting,//  Ra marvels with a smile, "You're doing fine.  Ask the Atet to slow as we approach, leave the area if there's //any// sign of danger, but otherwise stay put.  I'll be back as soon as I am able."

Hathor looks at the display with a serious expression, only glancing up to give Ra a small smile before speaking, "Atet,"  Her voice fills the bridge with a melodious tone, "Please begin slowing, then remain still when we reach our destination,"  She glances at Ra again, as if to confirm that she did it right.

//Close enough,//  He nods at her, then looks back at the forward viewport, seeing that appears to be large but primitive city beneath, "Hathor, if anything should befall me, take this ship home, gather up the people closest to you, and ask the Atet to take you some place safe."

She nods sagely, but in her eyes there's an unasked question begging to be asked.  He quickly turns and walks away before she can ask anything he does not wish to answer.

The Atet has not yet come to a complete stop before a falcon can be seen leaving the ship, gliding over the city with keen eyes observing everything.

He circles the Atet, then spirals outward, taking in more and more of the city and surrounding terrain.  But it's when he sees the massive stone structure in the early stages of construction near the center of the city that he finds himself shocked.  

There, among the bustling people, many looking in awe at the Atet, is the early stages of construction, construction of a structure that can only be a pyramid.  

Utterly shocked by the revelation, Ra glides toward the site, causing the crowd to gasp in surprise as he returns to his own form right before touching the ground.

"Who commanded that this be built?"  Ra gestures at the pyramid site, the local language feeling awkward on his tongue after so much time among the people of Egypt.

"Nyarlathotep!
passages.content_zh:
幾個小時後，拉發現自己靠在哈索爾身上，看著她做什麼，//她有駕駛的天賦，//拉微笑著驚嘆，“你做得很好。請阿特在我們接近時放慢速度，如果有//任何//危險跡象就離開該區域，但否則留在原地。我會盡快回來。”

哈索爾表情嚴肅地看著顯示屏，只抬頭對拉微微一笑，然後說道：「阿泰，」她的聲音充滿了艦橋中悠揚的音調，「請開始放慢速度，到達目的地後保持靜止。」她又看了一眼拉，彷彿在確認自己做對了。

//夠近了，//他向她點點頭，然後回頭看向前方的視窗，看到下面似乎是一座巨大但原始的城市，“哈索爾，如果我遇到什麼事情，就開這艘船回家，召集離你最近的人，並要求阿特帶你到安全的地方。”

她明智地點點頭，但眼中卻有一個未問的問題等著問。  在她問出任何他不想回答的問題之前，他迅速轉身走開。

阿特號還沒完全停穩，就看到一隻獵鷹離開了船，在城市上空滑翔，用敏銳的眼睛觀察著一切。

他繞著阿泰特轉了一圈，然後螺旋向外，越來越多地看到了城市和周圍的地形。  但當他看到市中心附近正在建設的早期階段的巨大石頭結構時，他發現自己感到震驚。  

在那裡，在熙熙攘攘的人群中，許多人敬畏地看著阿泰特，這是建築的早期階段，建造的結構只能是金字塔。  

拉對這一發現感到非常震驚，他滑向現場，在接觸地面之前他恢復了原來的形態，引起了人群的驚訝。

「這是誰下令建造的？」 拉在金字塔遺址上打手勢，在與埃及人民相處了這麼長時間後，他的舌頭上的當地語言感覺很尷尬。

「奈亞拉托提普！

passages.name: Q6Part3
passages.content:
"If you aren't going to kill me, then what is it that you want?"  Ra asks, feeling remarkably calm given his situation.

Ra begins to become aware of more of his surroundings, what appears to be a crude but large throne dominating the center of the room.  The tiny crystals reflecting the light in the room to cast a faint glow.  Then shapes among the crystals capture Ra's attention, skulls, dozens of them, perched in small alcoves or sitting on the ground.  Each gazing back at him from black caverns behind empty eye sockets.

All the while, Nyarlathotep's horrid form slowly returns to what Ra had seen in their first meeting, "I want you to help me,"  His unseen smile is evident in his tone.

"And why would I do that?"  Ra asks cautiously.

"Because you have already lost, and helping me is the only way you achieve even a semblance of victory," Nyarlathotep's eyes half close, and an almost imperceptible laugh comes from everywhere at once.

Ra's skin crawls, feeling as if it wishes to slip from his very flesh.  He shudders, and with an act of will pushes back the feeling, "You would help me save this world?"  He asks skeptically, knowing in the core of his being that this is a trick of some kind, //These creatures are full of lies, they have no honor that is understood by anyone but themselves, and they revel in the suffering of all they encounter.//  The thoughts help to resolve his will.

"I would,"  Nyarlathotep replies simply.

"And what would you gain from this?"  Ra's thoughts are whirling, trying to figure out how this all comes together.

"Everything,"  There's a gravity to the one word that fills Ra with a deep chill.

Ra pivots, fear spurring him to action.  He takes two rapid steps toward the cave he came from before his conscious mind registers that it simply is not there any longer.  

"Let me tell you what is happening here, so you might better understand your failure,"  Nyarlathotep coos.

Slowly, Ra turns back to face the Black Pharaoh, to see the human
passages.content_zh:
「既然你不殺我，那你到底想做什麼？」Ra問道，考慮到他的處境，他感到非常平靜。

拉開始更意識到他周圍的環境，一個看似簡陋但巨大的王座佔據了房間的中央。  微小的晶體反射著房間裡的光線，發出微弱的光芒。  然後晶體中的形狀吸引了拉的注意，頭骨，數十個，棲息在小壁龕中或坐在地上。  每個人都在空洞的眼窩後面的黑色洞穴中回望他。

與此同時，奈亞拉托提普那可怕的形態慢慢地恢復到了拉在他們第一次見面時所看到的樣子，「我想要你幫助我，」他的語氣中顯而易見的是他看不見的微笑。

「那我為什麼要這麼做呢？」 拉小心翼翼地問。

「因為你已經輸了，只有幫助我，你才能取得哪怕是表面上的勝利。」奈亞拉托提普半閉著眼睛，一道幾乎難以察覺的笑聲同時從四面八方傳來。

拉的皮膚開始蠕動，感覺好像它想要從他的肉體上滑落。  他全身顫抖，並用意志力壓抑住了這種感覺，「你會幫助我拯救這個世界嗎？」他懷疑地問道，他內心深處知道這是某種詭計，//這些生物充滿了謊言，他們沒有除了自己之外任何人都能理解的榮譽，他們陶醉於所遇到的一切痛苦。 //這些想法有助於解決他的意志。

「我願意，」奈亞拉托提普簡單地回答。

「那麼你會從中得到什麼好處呢？」拉的思緒飛旋，試圖弄清楚這一切是如何結合在一起的。

「一切，」這個字的嚴肅性讓Ra感到一陣深深的寒意。

拉轉身，恐懼促使他採取行動。  他向原來的洞穴快步走了兩步，然後他的意識意識到它已經不在那裡了。  

「讓我告訴你這裡發生了什麼，這樣你就能更好地理解你的失敗，」奈亞拉托提普低聲說道。

慢慢地，拉轉身面對黑法老，看到人類

passages.name: Q6Part2
passages.content:
//What good would fleeing do me?  I'd have to deal with this place sooner or later anyway,//  Ra thinks as he makes his way down the dark tunnel, the man ahead of him carrying a torch, the only source of light for either of them, //Perhaps him not having his people kill me outright is a good sign?//  Even as the thought crosses his mind, he knows he's just trying to comfort himself.  He's just preparing to cast a glance behind himself when the man speaks again.

"We're nearly there,"  He says, staving off any last minute thoughts of escape.  Then he steps off to the side, motioning for Ra to pass.

Ra looks at the man, then past him, his pulse increasing as he hesitantly steps past the man.  As soon as he is past, he can see faint light from further down the corridor.

Each footstep seems to draw the light closer, //No, it's not a single light, it's a multitude of lights,// Ra realizes.

A dozen more steps makes Ra aware that while there isn't enough light to see by, that he's stepping into a chamber, or at least a much wider stretch of the cave.

"It's oddly beautiful isn't it?  The faintest of lights is enough to set the crystals aglow.  The two of us are unique in that we can even see it in such low light.  The flesh that inhabits this world, their eyes can not,"  The voice holds a sense of wonder, though the very fact that he hears Nyarlathotep's voice is enough to fill him with a cold chill.

As Ra stands perfectly still, he can see some of the tiny lights flickering out, as if something black as the darkness that surrounds him passes between him and tiny points of light.

Then in a heartbeat, two floating orbs appear in the darkness, one larger than the other.  In the dark, even that light is nearly blinding, not only are they two points of light, but it sets the entire cavern aglow that takes Ra's breath away.  However the natural beauty of the cave is quickly eclipsed by Nyarlathotep's presence.  

Like a tangled mass of black tentacles draped in a starfield
passages.content_zh:
//逃跑对我有什么好处？  無論如何，我遲早要處理這個地方，//當Ra沿著黑暗的隧道走下去時，他想道，他前面的那個人拿著火把，這是他們倆唯一的光源，//也許他沒有讓他的人民直接殺掉我是一個好兆頭？ //即使這個想法閃過他的腦海，他知道他只是想安慰自己。  他正準備回頭看一眼，男人又開口了。

「我們快到了，」他說道，在最後一刻打消了任何逃跑的念頭。  然后他走到一边，示意Ra过去。

拉看著那個男人，然後越過他，當他猶豫地走過那個男人時，他的脈搏加快了。  他一過去，就看到走廊深處傳來微弱的燈光。

每一步似乎都將光拉得更近，//不，這不是單一的光，而是眾多的光，//Ra意識到。

又走了十幾級台階，拉意識到雖然沒有足夠的光線可以看見，但他正在走進一個房間，或者至少是更寬闊的洞穴。

「美得奇特，不是嗎？最微弱的光芒就足以讓水晶閃閃發亮。我們兩個人的獨特之處在於，在如此微弱的光線下我們都能看到它。居住在這個世界上的血肉，他們的眼睛卻看不到。」聲音中帶著一絲驚奇，儘管光是聽到奈亞拉托提普的聲音就足以讓他渾身發冷。

當拉一動不動地站著時，他可以看到一些微小的光芒在閃爍，彷彿有什麼黑色的東西在他周圍的黑暗中從他和微小的光點之間穿過。

然後眨眼間，兩個漂浮的球體出現在黑暗中，一個比另一個大。  在黑暗中，即使是那道光也幾乎令人目眩，它們不僅是兩個光點，而且讓整個洞穴都變得通紅，讓拉無法呼吸。  然而，奈亞拉托提普的出現很快就讓洞穴的自然美景黯然失色。  

就像一团缠绕在星空中的黑色触手

passages.name: PicnicStart
passages.content:
Half an hour later, Ra finds himself sitting in the shade among a small grove of trees.  His attention divided between the lazily flowing water of the Nile, and Hathor who is just now sitting a hand woven basket between them.  A cluster of boulders even blocks the view of the city in the distance to give the illusion of complete seclusion.

He turns toward her, watching as she opens it to reveal a picnic worth of food.  She reaches inside, plucking a fig from inside and holding it toward Ra.  Instead of handing it to him however, she moves it to his lips.  

Ra leans back slightly, then parts his lips to accept the dried fruit.  Hathor smiles as he nips playfully at her fingertips.  She picks up another fig, a giggle threatening to spill forth as she moves it toward his lips, but then pulls back at the last possible instant as he goes to bite the small fruit.

Smiling, Ra lunges at her, snagging the fruit from her grip, only he feels a tug at his hip and looks down just in time to see his loincloth pulled away by a giggling Hathor.  

Ra nearly drops the fig as he tries to snag the piece of fabric back away from her but she nimbly dances out of his reach.  In a second, he finds himself chasing after her.  

As she pivots to stay out of his reach, his hand lashes out and catches her headdress, pulling it from her brow.  Hathor skids to a halt, amusement overwhelming the pretend shock on her face.

Then the tables are turned and a naked Ra runs from Hathor, her headdress in his hands, his loincloth in hers.  Right before Hathor reaches him , Ra sidesteps, placing her headdress on his own head as he does so.  

In an instant he is running again, rounding the pile of boulders while looking over his shoulder.  He doesn't even see the small herd of cows until he crashes into a white one.

His body's defense mechanism kicks in only because he's too surprised to stop it.  The cow's genetic code is stored almost instantly in his body, at the same time his body starts to chan
passages.content_zh:
半小時後，拉發現自己坐在一小片樹林的陰涼處。  他的注意力分散在緩緩流淌的尼羅河和哈索爾身上，後者正坐在他們之間的一個手工編織的籃子裡。  一群巨石甚至擋住了遠處城市的視線，給人一種完全與世隔絕的錯覺。

他轉向她，看著她打開門，露出一份適合野餐的食物。  她把手伸進去，從裡面摘下一顆無花果，把它舉向拉。  然而，她沒有把它遞給他，而是把它移到了他的唇邊。  

拉微微向後靠，然後張開嘴唇接受乾果。  哈索爾微笑著，頑皮地咬著她的指尖。  她又拿起另一顆無花果，當她把它移向他的嘴唇時，她差點笑出聲來，但當他去咬那顆小水果時，她在最後一刻又縮了回去。

拉微笑著向她撲來，從她手中奪走了水果，只是他感覺到臀部被拉了一下，低下頭正好看到他的纏腰布被咯咯笑的哈索爾拉開了。  

當拉試圖把那塊布從她手中奪回時，無花果差點掉下來，但她敏捷地跳開了他的觸及範圍。  下一秒，他發現自己追上了她。  

當她轉身避開他的觸及時，他的手猛地伸出，抓住了她的頭飾，將其從她的額頭上拉了下來。  哈索爾突然停了下來，臉上的喜悅蓋過了假裝的震驚。

然後情況逆轉，赤裸裸的拉從哈索爾身邊跑了出來，他手裡拿著她的頭飾，她手裡拿著他的纏腰布。  就在哈索爾到達他面前時，拉開了，將她的頭飾戴在了自己的頭上。  

剎那間，他又開始奔跑，繞過那堆巨石，同時回頭看去。  他甚至沒有看到那一小群牛，直到他撞上了一頭白色的牛。

他身體的防禦機制啟動只是因為他太驚訝而無法阻止它。  牛的遺傳密碼幾乎立刻就儲存在它的體內，同時它的身體也開始改變。

passages.name: Q4Run
passages.content:
<<if $Bastet is "true">>Realizing that speed is important, but agility could save his life, Ra forces back a scream as broken bones try to reshape themselves, as damaged flesh twists and reforms itself.  

//This is going to hurt,//  Ra thinks, deciding to go slowly at first, at least until he knows if he's in imminent danger or not.

//'Don't leave us,'//  The voices call urgently behind him.

He shuts the voices out.  His pace quickening as he glances over his shoulder only to see the Bukavac rising from the water, not a single drop of water visible on it's scales.

His ribs scream in protest as he flees the creature, it's movements drawing it closer with every thundering step.  As it draws near, Ra uses the cat's incredible agility to bolt to one side, evading the creature for a few more precious seconds.

And that's when he sees it.  //Runestone!//  The engraved stone is nearly hidden by a tangle of roots and rotten vines, but it's visible all the same.  

Ra's eyes dart around for anything that could potentially help him.  Anything that might be able to use to break or damage the rune.

passages.name: Ra Returns to Ship
passages.content:
Late in the night, he stands, "Thank you all for your hospitality.  I am greatly honored by this eve's celebrations."  

The entire area about him falls silent, music quieting, conversations ending as he speaks.

"I intend to return to my ship this eve, and I shall return to you as the sun begins to brighten the horizon once more.  When I return, I will wish to speak with your leaders, your elders, and your people of learning.  We have much to discuss, and even more to do."  With a formal bow, he turns to go.

Ra is just leaving the village when he notices someone following.  He takes a few more steps before stopping and turning.

Just a few paces behind him, Hathor follows.

//In the dark, her skin almost looks blue.  If her eyes were a proper black instead of brown and white, she could be beautiful in this light.//

She seems to sense his scrutiny, a nervous smile forming on her lips.

//These people are so confusing.  She is acting so strange.//

Instead of speaking, he lets her catch up before starting to walk again.  She seems intent on following a few steps behind him until he urges, "I find it much easier to converse with someone when they walk by my side rather than behind me."

She mumbles an apology, her footsteps bringing her to only a single pace behind himself and to the side.  

//This is likely the best I will get.// "Share with me your thoughts?"  Ra prompts.

"You say that a great evil is coming, yet I look at you with a sense of wonder and can barely think of anything else,"  She says, each word sounding carefully chosen.

Hathor slows to a stop before the ship, her eyes wide as she looks at it in the dark.  The moonlight seems to reflect off of the ship's hull in a way that makes the whole ship glow in the faint light.

Stepping through the portal leading inside, Ra turns and watches Hathor for a few seconds.  She takes a tentative step forward, her hand coming up to touch the edge of the portal with a look of wonder on her face.  

"Illuminate,"
passages.content_zh:
深夜，他站起來，“謝謝大家的盛情款待。今晚的慶祝活動讓我感到非常榮幸。”

他周圍的整個區域都陷入了沉默，音樂也安靜下來，談話隨著他的說話而結束。

「我打算今天晚上回到我的船上，當太陽再次照亮地平線時，我將回到你們身邊。當我回來時，我希望與你們的領導人、你們的長輩和你們的學者交談。我們有很多事情要討論，甚至還有更多的事情要做。」他正式鞠了一躬，轉身準備走。

Ra 剛離開村莊，就注意到有人跟蹤。  他又走了幾步，然後停下來轉身。

哈索爾緊隨其後，僅幾步之遙。

//在黑暗中，她的皮膚幾乎看起來是藍色的。  如果她的眼睛是適當的黑色而不是棕色和白色，那麼在這個光線下她會很漂亮。 //

她似乎察覺到了他的審視，嘴角浮現一抹緊張的微笑。

//這些人太令人困惑了。  她的行為很奇怪。 //

他沒有說話，而是讓她跟上，然後又開始走路。  她似乎一心想跟在他身後幾步，直到他催促道：“我發現與走在我身邊而不是在我身後的人交談要容易得多。”

她咕噥著道歉，她的腳步讓她只到了他身後一步，走到了一邊。  

//這可能是我能得到的最好的。 // “跟我分享你的想法嗎？” 拉提示道。

「你說有一場大災難即將來臨，但我卻用一種驚奇的眼光看著你，幾乎無法思考其他事情，」她說，每一個字聽起來都是經過精心挑選的。

哈索爾在船前放慢了速度，在黑暗中睜大眼睛看著它。  月光似乎從船體上反射出來，使整艘船在微弱的燈光下閃閃發光。

穿過通往內部的傳送門，拉轉身看了哈索爾幾秒鐘。  她試探性地向前邁出了一步，抬起手觸摸了傳送門的邊緣，臉上帶著驚訝的表情。  

“照亮，”

passages.name: Q3G
passages.content:
Ra doesn't know how long he sits alone in the cage, he even begins to wonder if Abu will even come back to torment him, then the soft sound of a sandal on the dirt floor captures his attention.

His words are stillborn on his lips though when he does not see who he expects.  Instead of Abu, he sees Hathor, her eyes wide with fright and a sword clutched in both hands.  Her right arm is crimson with blood as is the blade of the sword she is holding.

A look of relief crosses her features and in a second she sags slightly.  From where Ra is sitting, the relief is tangible like a physical thing.

Ra's eyes dart to the place she came from and seeing no sign of anyone else, he hisses beneath his breath, "I told you to flee if I did not return."

She remains silent for a few seconds, her eyes drifting over the glowing orange wall that surrounds him, then following the long cable to the console before returning to Ra.

<<if $sunGod is "true">>"Forgive me, but I felt compelled to help if I could,"  She says, her eyes flickering to the passage behind her urgently, "How do I help?

<<else>>"You can be mad at me later, how do I help?"  She retorts testily.

<</if>>"You can't, you wouldn't know how to use the console, and I'm not in a position to show you how,"  Ra says, "Leave, before they find you."

"That is making the light around you?"  Hathor asks.

Ra has a bad feeling about the way she asks the question, but he nods anyway.

Then before he can protest, Hathor rises the sword and swings it with a loud grunt, the sharp blade bisecting the cable in a shower of sparks.  

Hathor screams, the sword careening through the air as she looses her grip on it.  At the same time her hair frizzles up and she shakes her hands violently.  

It only takes a second longer, but the orange light fades.

Glancing down at the mess on the ground at his feet, //My child,// Then he looks at Hathor, seeing her clearly hurt.  

As fast as his feet will take him, he crosses the distance to her, loo
passages.content_zh:
拉不知道他獨自在籠子裡坐了多久，他甚至開始懷疑阿布是否會回來折磨他，然後涼鞋踩在泥土地板上的輕柔聲音引起了他的注意。

"You aren't going to kill me?"  Ra asks, his voice far more steady than he expected.

That's when the screaming starts.  Ra looks past this thing, this terrible thing that frightens him more than anything he has ever had the displeasure of laying eyes upon before in his life, and what he sees validates every bit of fear that threatens to consume him.  

The humans and the ghouls, all of them are screaming now, blood flowing freely from their eyes, ears, nose, and mouth.  Ra can see their teeth beginning to fall out, their fingernails falling away from their hands, and the hair falling from their bodies.

然而，無論他多麼想把這一刻留到最後，他的親戚還是

passages.name: Q3E
passages.content:
Something deep inside of Ra snaps, an anguished scream leaving his lips as he raises his foot and slams it down on the abomination he just birthed.  The thing makes a shrill sound, a sound that calls every fiber of Ra's being to protect it, but instead he rises his foot and stomps the horrid thing a second time.

Outside of the cage, Abu is screaming at the top of his lungs, animalistic sounds as he expresses his displeasure, raging at Ra for what he is doing yet unable to do anything about it.

When it's over, Ra heaves, emptying the contents of his stomach onto the ground as a wave of grief threatens to overwhelm him, //There was no other option, to allow that //thing// to live could have caused immeasurable harm, it could have corrupted worlds, slain thousands.//  He tries to reason with himself, but the arguments keep being washed away behind a single thought, //I gave birth to it, and there is no greater betrayal than for a parent to end the life of their child.//

Ra doesn't hear a word of what Abu is saying as he rages at Ra.  Eventually he seems to tire of his own voice, mutters something, then storms from the chamber, leaving Ra alone to his dark thoughts.

[[Continue.|Q3G]]
passages.content_zh:
拉內心深處的某種東西崩潰了，當他抬起腳踩在他剛剛誕生的可憎之物上時，他的嘴唇發出一聲痛苦的尖叫。  那東西發出尖銳的聲音，這種聲音召喚著拉的每一根纖維來保護它，但他卻抬起腳，第二次踩踏了這個可怕的東西。

在籠子外面，阿布用盡獸性的聲音尖叫著表達他的不滿，對拉所做的事情感到憤怒，但又無能為力。

當一切結束時，Ra 喘著氣，將胃裡的東西倒在地上，一陣悲傷的浪潮威脅著他，//沒有其他選擇，讓那東西//活著可能會造成不可估量的傷害，它可能會腐蝕世界，殺死數千人。 //他試圖與自己推理，但爭論不斷被一個想法沖走，//我生下了它，沒有比父母結束自己生命更大的背叛了孩子.//

當阿布對拉發怒時，拉根本沒聽到阿佈在說什麼。  最後他似乎厭倦了自己的聲音，咕噥了一些什麼，然後衝出了房間，留下拉一個人沉浸在他黑暗的思緒中。

[[繼續。 |Q3G]]

passages.name: Q2END1
passages.content:
Back on the bridge of the Atet, Ra broods, thinking about the Cthonians and how best to approach the problem.  For more than an hour he sits there looking at the display before his eyes widen, "Ana ahmaq!"  He laughs, his hands flying over the controls, "That might just work!"

The Atet vibrates slightly as it raises into the air, "Lets see if we can clear that mound,"  He mumbles, guiding the ship toward the mound.  Once there, he flares the engines, blasting much of the carnage away from the hilltop.  Almost immediately the ship's computer locates two of the nine runes that would twist reality and allow a portal to form.  

//Only need to destroy one to destroy the whole thing.//  And with that thought firmly in mind, he jukes the controls, causing one end of the Atet to dip and slam into the ground.  The warning claxons that begin to wail inside of the ship tells him how ill advised his plan was, but even so he sees one of the runes flicker on the screen before him before fading out.

A triumphant grin forms on his lips, //Got it!//

The smile falters seconds later when Ra hears a deep rumble coming from the ground beneath the ship..  He springs into motion, working the controls to raise the Atet first into the air, then to move it back away from the area.

As he watches, the entire mound begins to collapse in on itself, like a massive sinkhole it grows at an alarming rate.  Dirt, rock, and plants fall into the hole but nothing seems to slow it's progress.  He's surprised when he sees the massive sinkhole reach the nearby river, the water beginning to flow into the hole rather than down stream. 

And then it stops growing.  As if seeking only to quench it's thirst the hole stops its advance.  //In a couple of days, the water will have filled it.//  Ra remains for a few seconds longer, surveying the ground beneath him, //In a couple of days, this will look like any of a thousand other lakes that dot this region.//

Comforted that the immediate threat has passed, h
passages.content_zh:
回到阿泰特河的艦橋上，拉沉思著克索尼亞人以及如何最好地解決這個問題。  他坐在那裡看著顯示器一個多小時，然後睜大了眼睛，“Ana ahmaq！” 他笑了，雙手飛過控制器，“這可能有用！”

阿泰號在升到空中時輕微振動，「讓我們看看我們能否清除那個土丘，」他咕噥道，引導船駛向土丘。  一到那裡，他就點燃引擎，將大部分屠殺從山頂上炸開。  飛船的電腦幾乎立刻就找到了九個符文中的兩個，這些符文將扭曲現實並允許形成傳送門。  

//只需要摧毀一個就可以摧毀整個東西。 //牢牢記住這個想法，他搖動控制裝置，導致 Atet 的一端陷入並猛烈地撞擊地面。  船內開始響起的警告喇叭告訴他他的計劃是多麼不明智，但即便如此，他還是看到其中一個符文在他面前的螢幕上閃爍，然後消失了。

他的嘴角浮現出勝利的笑容，//明白了！ //

幾秒鐘後，當 Ra 聽到從船下的地面傳來低沉的隆隆聲時，笑容僵住了。他猛地行動起來，操作控制器將 Atet 首先升到空中，然後將其移回遠離該區域的地方。

當他看到時，整個土丘開始自行塌陷，就像一個巨大的天坑，它以驚人的速度增長。  泥土、岩石和植物掉進洞裡，但似乎沒有什麼能減緩它的進展。  當他看到巨大的天坑延伸到附近的河流時，他感到很驚訝，水開始流入天坑而不是下游。 

然后它就停止生长了。  仿佛只是为了解渴，洞停止了前进。  //几天后，水就会填满它。 //拉又多停留了幾秒鐘，測量著他腳下的地面，//幾天后，這將看起來像散佈在這個地區的上千個其他湖泊中的任何一個。 //

欣慰的是眼前的威胁已经过去，h

passages.name: Reset Ra's Virginity.
passages.content:
You have just reset Ra's virginity.  He has never enjoyed the carnal embrace of any creature from earth.

[[Return to game.|Entering Sandbox.]]
<<set $RaCherry to "unpopped">>
passages.content_zh:
你剛剛重置了 Ra 的童貞。  他從未享受過地球上任何生物的肉體擁抱。
