完成後，他以一半是鱷魚、一半是他自己的形態高聳在周圍的守衛之上。  他巨大的頭轉動著，尋找戰鬥，然後他帶著一扇笨重的門開始戰鬥，每一步都用巨大的爪子敲打著沙子。

當拉接近戰鬥時，他看到了其中一個食屍鬼。  他看到它猛烈攻擊一名男子，抓住該男子的頭部和臀部並用力拉扯。  在那一瞬間，男人的尖叫聲貫穿了整個戰鬥，隨後戰鬥就如他的生命一樣迅速結束了。

食屍鬼在一片鮮血和血腥中將男人撕成兩半。  在那一刻，與該生物對峙的另外兩個人看起來準備逃跑，他們的勇氣開始動搖。

一秒鐘後，拉開他們，身後還有幾名衛兵。  拉徒手抓住了食屍鬼，將這個驚訝的生物猛烈地摔在地上，讓它失去了方向感，然後他把手轉移到食屍鬼的腿上，他像叉骨一樣把它撕成兩半，然後漫不經心地把這個死了、破碎的東西扔在了腳邊。

他的注意力回到了周圍的戰鬥上，沒多久他就弄清楚了戰鬥最激烈的地方在哪裡。

當他進入戰鬥的主體部分時，他看到了數十隻食屍鬼。  當拉進入他們中間時，許多生物將注意力轉向了他。  當六隻怪物攻擊他時，可以從大批敵人中聽到拉的咆哮聲，雖然幾乎任何其他形式都會被撕成碎片，但鱷魚的天生盔甲可以保護他免受除了最嚴重的攻擊之外的所有攻擊。  

當拉猛烈攻擊時，他充滿了憤怒，將手臂從屍體上劃開，在胸口撕開深深的皺紋，甚至扭斷了一個食屍鬼的頭，因為他成為了敵人中大屠殺的化身。  

越來越多的食屍鬼將注意力轉向拉。  他內心的某些部分擔心，隨著越來越多的食屍鬼的攻擊突破了他的防禦，這可能就是終點。  沒有一個能深入，但每一個都只會削弱他一點點

passages.name: Visit the temples.
passages.content:
The temples of the city are easy to spot.  Most skirt the edges of the city, but others rise up from within the city itself, massive pillars stretching for the sky as if attempting to case everything around the temple in shadow.  Some temples have imposing walls, like a fortress in their own right.  Every wall covered in carvings and painted hieroglyphics. Others are flanked by huge statues that seem to guard the entrances.  

<<set $random to random(1,8)>><<if $random is 1>>A soft gasp of discomfort escapes his lips as Ra begins to change.  Fully formed feathers sprout from his skin in a wave reminiscent of a breeze passing over a field of tall grass.  

He stretches his wings wide as they finish forming, at the same time the ground seems to rush up to meet him as his body contracts, forcing his bulk into a much smaller form.  

//I enjoy the freedom this avian gives me, but I wish they were larger animals It's uncomfortable forcing all of my mass into such a small body.//

Tilting his head to one side, his lips pull forward to form a hard beak while his eyes shrink to fit the falcon he now appears to be.

Crouching, he springs into the air with a thunderous clap of his wings.

Once airborne, he quickly forgets the tightness of his too-dense body and simply enjoys the feel of the wind beneath his wings.  For just a few seconds he allows himself to be content before turning his attention to the temples.

Circling once, he glides toward the temples until he sees one with statues depicting himself on the outside.  

Rather than assuming his natural form and walking through the front archway, he instead glides into the courtyard.

Several onlookers seem surprised to see a large falcon land in their midst, but that surprise turns to awe as he allows himself to transform back into his natural form.

He leans forward as his face begins t
passages.content_zh:
這座城市的寺廟很容易被發現。  大多數都圍繞著城市的邊緣，但也有一些從城市內部拔地而起，巨大的柱子伸向天空，彷彿試圖將寺廟周圍的一切籠罩在陰影中。  有些寺廟擁有雄偉的圍牆，本身就像一座堡壘。  每面牆上都刻滿了雕刻和彩繪的象形文字。其他人的兩側是巨大的雕像，似乎守衛著入口。  

<<將 $random 設定為 random(1,8)>><<如果 $random 為 1>>當 Ra 開始變化時，一聲不舒服的輕柔喘息從他的嘴唇中逸出。  完全成形的羽毛從他的皮膚上長出，波浪狀的讓人想起微風吹過一片高高的草叢。  

當翅膀完成成形時，他將翅膀張開，同時當他的身體收縮時，地面似乎衝上來迎接他，迫使他的體積變得更小。  

//我喜歡這隻鳥給我的自由，但我希望它們是更大的動物，將我所有的質量強行塞進這麼小的身體裡，這很不舒服。 //

他的頭向一側傾斜，嘴唇向前拉，形成堅硬的喙，同時他的眼睛縮小以適應他現在看起來的獵鷹。

他蹲伏在空中，翅膀發出雷鳴般的拍打聲。

一旦升空，他很快就忘記了自己過於密集的身體的緊繃感，只是享受著翅膀下風的感覺。  他只滿足了幾秒鐘，然後將注意力轉向太陽穴。

他繞了一圈，滑向寺廟，直到他看到一座寺廟的外面有他自己的雕像。  

他沒有採取自然形態穿過前面的拱門，而是滑入庭院。

有些旁觀者似乎很驚訝地看到一隻巨大的獵鷹降落在他們中間，但當他讓自己變回自然形態時，這種驚訝變成了敬畏。

<<elseif $random lte 3 and $Anubis is "true">>Ra 讓他的改變逐漸發生，盡量減少轉變帶來的不適。

當他的臉開始出現時，他身體前傾。

passages.name: Ra does not correct their mistake.
passages.content:
//Perhaps it will be easier this way?//  Ra thinks, momentarily amused at the thought of being worshiped as a God before the gravity of doing so begins to sink in.  

The smile is stillborn on his face as the reality of his situation sinks in, //If they see me as a God, then that might make this easier?  Surely one lie is a small price to pay in order to save this world?//

"You will bring forth your priesthood and your elders.  Tonight we shall feast and tomorrow we will begin to plan for what is to come,"  Ra's mood darkens slightly, not liking the situation he puts himself in but seeing no other solution.

An old man stands uncertainly, his head still downcast, "It will be as you say great one."

Ra feels a chill go through him at the term 'Great one' as it dredges up memories of his world's fall, but he quickly shakes the thought as he focuses on the man's words.

Glancing over his shoulder at one of the still kneeling people, he urgently declares, "Go, find Hathor, we have need of her."

Then his eyes turn back to Ra, there's a reverence in his features, "Our humble village does not have much, but all we have we offer to you,"  The man says, bowing forward so far Ra fears the man will fall forward, "[[Tonight, we host a feast in your honor!]]"
passages.content_zh:
//也許這樣會比較容易？ //Ra想道，在意識到這樣做的嚴重性之前，一想到自己被當作神來崇拜，一瞬間覺得好笑。  

當他意識到自己的處境的現實時，他臉上的笑容僵住了，//如果他們把我視為上帝，那麼這可能會讓這件事變得更容易嗎？  為了拯救這個世界，一個謊言難道只是一個小小的代價嗎？ //

「你將帶來你的祭司和長輩。今晚我們將大飽口福，明天我們將開始計劃即將發生的事情，」拉的心情稍微陰沉下來，不喜歡自己所處的處境，但也看不到其他解決辦法。

一名老者猶豫不決地站著，低著頭道：“就如你所說，偉大的。”

聽到「偉大的人」這個詞，拉感到一陣寒意，因為它喚起了他世界墮落的記憶，但當他專注於這個男人的話時，他很快就擺脫了這個想法。

他回頭看了一眼仍然跪著的人，緊急宣布：“去找哈索爾，我們需要她。”

然後他的目光轉向拉，臉上帶著敬畏，“我們簡陋的村莊沒有太多東西，但我們把所有的都奉獻給你，”那人說著，向前鞠了一躬，拉擔心那人會向前倒下，“[[今晚，我們為你舉辦一場盛宴！]]”

passages.name: Q6D1
passages.content:
Faster than any time he has ever transformed before, Ra forces the change.  Every inch of his body is engulfed in fiery white pain that fades nearly as fast as it starts.

Half canine, Ra roars in rage as he hurls himself at the horror before himself.  His feet are barely off the ground, his arm only just starting to make a mighty swing at the monstrosity in front of him.  

Nyarlathotep's arm, shrouded in shifting shadows, snaps out to catch Ra by the throat.  As his fingers tighten, the flesh bulges between each finger, Ra's eyes bulging as he flails about trying to free himself.

With a deep sadness in his voice, Nyarlathotep sighs, "And now, you bore me."

The sound of flesh being rend fills the air, blood and gore gushing over Nyarlathotep's fingers before he drops the limp body to the ground at his feet.

END.



Or perhaps you would prefer to return to the Atet as if this never happened?

passages.content_zh:
拉強制改變的速度比以往任何時候都快。  他身體的每一寸都被熾熱的白色疼痛所吞噬，這種疼痛幾乎和開始時一樣快地消失了。

拉是半犬科動物，他憤怒地咆哮著，向眼前的恐怖撲去。  他的雙腳幾乎沒有離開地面，他的手臂才剛開始向面前的怪物猛烈揮動。  

奈亞拉托提普的手臂籠罩在不斷變化的陰影中，突然伸出來掐住拉的喉嚨。  當他的手指收緊時，每根手指之間的肉都凸出，當拉掙扎著試圖掙脫時，他的眼睛凸出。

奈亞拉托提普的聲音中帶著深深的悲傷，嘆息道：“而現在，你讓我感到厭煩了。”

空氣中充滿了血肉撕裂的聲音，鮮血和血跡從奈亞拉托提普的手指上湧出，然後他將柔軟的身體扔到了腳邊的地上。

結尾。



或者也許您更願意回到 Atet，就好像這件事從未發生過一樣？

passages.name: Entering Sandbox.
passages.content:
Standing on the bridge of his humble ship, the Atet, Ra looks out over the scene before him.  Where there was once a village is a rapidly growing city.  Grand temples are being built for worship, and on the horizon he can see the great pyramids being constructed.

In contrast to the golden sands, the emerald stripe winding across the landscape is a marvel in it's own right.  //The Nile is the lifeblood of these lands,//  He reflects as he looks at the way everything seems to be built around it's edges.

[img[ShipFinal]]

<<if $Story5 is 7>>"You look troubled,"  Hathor says softly when Ra sees her.

"I am,"  Ra admits, sighing heavily as he motions for her to join him, "It would seem that the ghouls have returned."

"Then you must return to the cemetery?  Face them again?"  She asks, her brow knitting with concern.

"No, they won't be there anymore.  They'll be somewhere else, somewhere without a fresh supply of the dead if they are attacking people in the streets at night,"  Ra speaks absently, his mind racing for a solution to their current crisis.

"Then where?"  Hathor asks, reaching out to place one hand gently against Ra's chest as she looks into his eyes.

//Pyramids that act as beacons,//  Amun's words come to Ra unbidden, "I don't know for sure, but I have a suspicion."

Ra grimaces, //Is this some kind of trap?  Is Amun trying to lead me to the pyramid site on purpose?//

His thoughts are interrupted by Hathor's voice, "That's not all that bothers you."

"No, it is not,"  Ra considers for a moment if he should share his thoughts with her, "What do you think of Amun?"

Hathor's expression turns mildly amused, "He is a good man, if perhaps a little arrogant and prideful,"  She pauses briefly, then continues, "Why do you ask?"

"I spoke with him, and some of what he said concerns me,"  Ra looks at Hathor, drowning in her deep brown eyes for a second, "I find myself wondering where his loyalties lie."

Hathor looks honestly surprised at Ra's words, "He makes no
passages.content_zh:
拉站在他那艘簡陋的阿泰號船的艦橋上，眺望著眼前的景象。  曾經有一個村莊的地方現在是一個快速發展的城市。  宏偉的寺廟正在建造用於崇拜，在地平線上他可以看到正在建造的偉大金字塔。

與金色的沙灘形成鮮明對比的是，蜿蜒穿過大地的祖母綠條紋本身就是一個奇蹟。  //尼羅河是這些土地的命脈，//當他觀察一切似乎都是圍繞其邊緣建造的方式時，他反思道。

[img[最終艦]]

<<如果 $Story5 是 7>>「你看起來很困擾，」當 Ra 看到她時，Hathor 輕聲說道。

“是的，”拉承認道，一邊示意她跟自己一起，一邊重重地嘆了口氣，“看來食屍鬼又回來了。”

「那你必須回到墓園嗎？再面對他們？」她關切地皺起眉頭問。

「不，他們不會再在那裡了。他們會在其他地方，如果他們晚上在街上襲擊人們，就會在沒有新死者的地方，」Ra心不在焉地說，他的思緒飛快地尋找解決當前危機的辦法。

「那去哪裡？」 哈索爾問道，當拉看著他的眼睛時，他伸出一隻手輕輕地放在拉的胸前。

//作為信標的金字塔，//阿蒙的話語不自覺地傳到了拉的耳中，“我不確定，但我有一個懷疑。”

Ra 做了個鬼臉，//這是某種陷阱嗎？  阿蒙是故意帶我去金字塔遺址嗎？ //

他的思緒被哈索爾的聲音打斷了，“讓你煩惱的還不止這些。”

“不，不是的，”拉考慮了一會兒是否應該與她分享自己的想法，“你覺得阿蒙怎麼樣？”

哈索爾的表情變得有些好笑，“他是一個好人，雖然可能有點傲慢和驕傲，”她停頓了一下，然後繼續說道，“你為什麼問這個？”

“我和他談過，他說的一些話與我有關，”拉看著哈索爾，在她深棕色的眼睛裡沉了一會兒，“我發現自己想知道他的忠誠在哪裡。”

哈索爾看起來確實對拉的話感到驚訝，「他沒有做任何事

passages.name: Bastet Cruel.
passages.content:
Letting his lip curl in distaste, he half pushes, half kicks the cat away from himself.

The cat pivots in mid air, landing on his feet facing you.  The hairs stand on it's back as it bears it's teeth in a raspy hiss.  

Ra pills on the genetic code he just obtained.  Black fur crawls across his skin.  Whiskers begin to form on what is becoming a short snout while the darks of his eyes pull into narrow slits while the surrounding orbs become a deep shade of gold.  His feet start to become paws but he forces his hands to maintain most of their humanoid appearance, only becoming furred and clawed.  

His lips curl back to expose his sharp feline teeth.  The hiss that fills the air is far louder than that of the cat.

The cat shies away, hissing one more time before darting away.

It's only then that Ra begins to really explore his new changes.  His hearing is more acute than he's experienced before.  Every sound seeming amplified.  With his feline eyes, every dark shadow seems brighter than he's used to.  //I could see well in the dark like this,// He thinks to himself.

From his chest, he can see breasts, swollen and full.  He wonders briefly if perhaps the cat that touched him was pregnant, knowing that sometimes such things can manifest in transformations on rare occasion.

[img[images/Ra-bas.png]]

As if to confirm the feminine nature of the feline, he lets his hand stray to his crotch, finding a damp cleft where he would expect a penis from a male of this world.

He allows himself a moment longer to admire his changes, then he shifts back to his natural form and makes his way back toward the temple entrance.

passages.content_zh:
他厭惡地撇了撇嘴，半推半踢地把貓從自己身上推開。

貓在半空中旋轉，面向你落地。  它的背上毛髮豎立，牙齒發出刺耳的嘶嘶聲。  

拉丸對他剛剛獲得的遺傳密碼進行了處理。  黑色的皮毛爬滿了他的皮膚。  鬍鬚開始在他的短鼻子上形成，而他的眼睛的黑色變成了狹窄的縫隙，而周圍的球體則變成了深金色。  他的腳開始變成爪子，但他強迫自己的手保持大部分人形外觀，只是變得長滿毛皮和爪子。  

他的嘴唇向後捲起，露出鋒利的貓牙。  空氣中瀰漫著嘶嘶聲，遠比貓的叫聲還要大聲。

貓躲開了，又嘶嘶地叫了一聲，然後就飛走了。

直到那時，Ra 才開始真正探索他的新變化。  他的聽力比以前更敏銳。  每一個聲音似乎都放大了。  在他貓般的眼睛裡，每一個黑影都比他以前看到的更加明亮。  //像這樣我在黑暗中看得很清楚，//他心裡想。

從他的胸部，他可以看到乳房，腫脹而飽滿。  他短暫地想知道觸摸他的貓是否懷孕了，因為他知道有時這種事情會在極少數情況下以轉變的形式顯現出來。

[img[圖片/Ra-bas.png]]

彷彿為了確認貓科動物的女性本質，他把手伸向胯部，找到了一個潮濕的裂縫，他希望那裡有來自這個世界的雄性的陰莖。

他讓自己多待了一會兒欣賞自己的變化，然後變回自然形態，朝著寺廟入口走去。

passages.name: Fifth Quest Part One 2
passages.content:
Stepping into a cool room, Amun turns toward Ra.  He opens his mouth to speak, but Ra talks first, "These are trying times, and you letting your temple guards patrol the temple district is both a brave and noble act.  A good leader earns the trust of those around him, and this kind of act is why so many look to you."

Ra's words seem to surprise Amun, his mouth closing as his eyes widen slightly in surprise.  It only lasts for a second before he recovers.  With a little bow, he gestures for Ra to sit, then sprawls himself across a pile of pillows, "These things that plague the city, they are ghouls?"  Amun doesn't give Ra time to reply before he continues, "They are dangerous, and every night there are reports of more people missing or killed.  How do we stop them?"

Sighing, Ra's eyes settle on the small man's face, "Ghouls collect the dead, twist them into something horrible, then give them a twisted sort of life to create more of their own.  They have been run out of the cemetery, and the fact that they are trying to capture the living means wherever they are hiding now does not have such a supply of corpses."

"You should have killed them all when you first encountered them,"  Amun says matter-of-fact.

"I had more pressing matters at that moment,"  Ra retorts bitterly.

Amun nods, an unkind glint in his eye, "Perhaps you are not the savior you claim to be,"  He growls the words, spitting near Ra's feet as he does so.

Ra bristles, anger rising up in him that he struggles to stamp back down, "And if it were not for me, this threat would already be at your doorstep."

"It would seem to me that it already is,"  Amun says, a wicked grin tugging at the corners of his mouth, "And I begin to wonder who the real enemy is."

Ra stands, anger rising up in him that can not be denied.  Reaching out, he knocks several items off of a nearby table, sending a platter of fruits clattering to the floor, "You have no idea what is coming, and you have a troubling lack of respect f
passages.content_zh:
走進一間涼爽的房間，阿蒙轉向拉。  他張了張嘴，但拉先開口說道：“現在是艱難的時期，你讓你的神殿守衛在神殿區巡邏是一種勇敢而高尚的行為。一個好的領導者會贏得周圍人的信任，而這種行為就是這麼多人仰望你的原因。”

拉的話似乎讓阿蒙吃了一驚，他閉上了嘴，驚訝地微微睜大了眼睛。  這種情況只持續了一秒鐘，他就恢復了。  他微微鞠了一躬，示意拉坐下，然後趴在一堆枕頭上，“這些困擾這座城市的東西，他們是食屍鬼嗎？” 阿蒙沒有給拉時間回答，就繼續說道：“他們很危險，每天晚上都有報告說有更多的人失踪或被殺。我們如何阻止他們？”

拉嘆了口氣，目光落在小個子的臉上，“食屍鬼收集死者，將他們扭曲成可怕的東西，然後賦予他們一種扭曲的生命，以創造出更多屬於自己的生命。他們已經被趕出了墓地，而他們試圖捕捉活人的事實意味著他們現在藏身的地方已經沒有那麼多屍體了。”

「當你第一次遇到他們時，你就應該把他們都殺了。」阿蒙實事求是地說。

「那一刻我有更緊迫的事情，」Ra 痛苦地反駁。

阿蒙點點頭，眼中閃爍著不友善的光芒，「也許你不是你自稱的救世主。」他咆哮著說道，同時在拉的腳邊吐了口唾沫。

拉毛骨悚然，憤怒在他心中升起，他掙扎著將自己踩下去，“如果不是我，這個威脅早就到了你家門口了。”

“在我看來，這已經是了，”阿蒙說道，嘴角扯起一抹邪惡的笑容，“我開始懷疑真正的敵人是誰。”

拉站了起來，無法否認的憤怒在他心中升騰。  他伸出手，打翻了附近桌子上的幾件物品，一盤水果掉到了地板上，“你不知道接下來會發生什麼，而且你對別人缺乏尊重，這令人不安。”

passages.name: Fifth Quest Part One 3
passages.content:
Before Amun is able to fully turn to address Ra, Ra is already speaking, "What exactly do you think you're doing?  The temple district is not your personal playground.  Let the city guards do what they must, and keep your people out of the way.  You have your people everywhere, this temple is yours, this city is not,"  Ra's anger burns bright as he speaks, and deep down he wonders how much of that anger stems from his own failings and the corruption coursing through his veins.

Amun's own face contorts as he steps closer to Ra, somehow looking down his nose at Ra even as he looks up at the much taller man, "You might be a God, but you will //not// question my intent.  This city is as much mine as this temple is,"  He jabs his finger into Ra's chest.  "You talk of stopping evils even as they stalk the very people you claim to protect.  You come among us in a time of peace, claiming evil is coming, evil that seems to have followed you to us,"  Much of the fire seems to go out of Amun as he steps back, "Ask yourself, who is the real enemy here?  The monsters, or the one who brought them?"

Ra stands very still, anger rising up in him that can not be denied.  Reaching out, he knocks several items off of a nearby table, sending a platter of fruits clattering to the floor, "You have no idea what is coming, how long they have been preparing for this, and you have a troubling lack of respect for someone who is trying to stop these dark gods."

Pivoting toward the door, Ra is nearly out of earshot when Amun calls after him, "Says the god who builds pyramids that act as beacons of darkness, as monsters stalk the streets at night,"  Amun's laughter is bitter, and it seems to follow Ra all the way back to the Atet.

//Is Amun part of this?  The enemy within?//  Ra seethes, fearing that Amun might be more than he seems, even as Ra feels the corruption in his veins slowly eating away at his soul.

passages.content_zh:
在阿蒙完全转身对拉说话之前，拉已经开口了，“你到底以为你在做什么？神殿区不是你的私人游乐场。让城市守卫做他们必须做的事，让你的人远离你的人。你到处都有你的人，这座神殿是你的，这座城市不是你的，”拉说话时怒火熊熊燃烧，内心深处他想知道这种愤怒有多少源于他自己的失败和他血管里流淌的腐败。

当阿蒙靠近拉时，他自己的脸都扭曲了，尽管他抬头看着那个高得多的男人，但他却以某种方式俯视着拉，“你可能是神，但你不会//质疑我的意图。这座城市和这座神庙一样都是我的，”他用手指戳进拉的胸口。  “你说要阻止邪恶，即使他们正在跟踪你声称要保护的人。你在和平时期来到我们中间，声称邪恶即将来临，邪恶似乎已经跟随你来到了我们身边，”阿蒙后退时似乎已经消退了大部分火焰，“问问你自己，谁是这里真正的敌人？怪物，还是带来它们的人？”

拉一動不動地站著，無法否認的憤怒在他心中升騰。  他伸出手，打翻了附近桌子上的几件物品，一盘水果掉到了地板上，“你不知道接下来会发生什么，他们为此准备了多久，而且你对那些试图阻止这些黑暗之神的人缺乏尊重，这令人不安。”

当拉转向门口时，拉几乎听不见了，这时阿蒙在他身后喊道：“建造金字塔的神说，这些金字塔充当黑暗的灯塔，就像怪物在夜间潜行在街道上一样。”阿蒙的笑声很苦涩，似乎跟着拉一路回到了阿特。

//阿蒙是其中的一部分嗎？  內心的敵人？ // Ra 沸騰了，擔心阿蒙可能比他看起來的更強大，儘管 Ra 感覺到他血管中的腐敗正在慢慢侵蝕他的靈魂。

passages.name: Q4Sneak
passages.content:
Very slowly, very carefully, Ra begins to move along the ground, half crawling, half dragging himself away from the water.

Every movement he makes seems to make the voices more urgent, //'Don't leave us, save us.  Come to the water's edge.  We can save you, you can save us.'//

He has to make a conscious effort to shut out the voices of the dead loved ones calling out to him.  He almost doesn't hear the Bukavac rising from the water's behind him.

Frantically, Ra scrambles to his feet, desperate to escape though it's already too late.  

Moving so fast it's difficult to track by sight, the creatures surges forward, it's tail whipping around to grab Ra by the throat.  Ra struggles, arms grasping at the powerful tail, though it seems to have no effect.  

Dropping Ra to the ground, it uses one of it's foreclaws to pin him to the ground, it's long thick fingers closing around his neck.  

The Bukavac growls, a soft ticking coming from the back of it's throat as it's rancid breath washes over Ra.

Ra struggles against the creature's powerful grip, shapeshifting first into a larger form in the hopes of fighting it off, then rapidly into a smaller form in the hopes of breaking it's grip. 

All the while, the creature looks down at Ra, somehow looking pleased as it chokes the life out of him.

As his vision starts to fade, he can see motion at the edges of his vision, just beyond where he can see clearly.  The voices from the water seem ever closer, cooing, encouraging him as he begins to loose consciousness.

His final thought is of Hathor, and this world, before the Bukavac tightens it's grip, the sounds of bones grinding and breaking are nearly lost in the creature's triumphant growl.

END.

passages.content_zh:
拉開始非常緩慢、非常小心地沿著地面移動，一半是爬行，一半是拖著自己離開水面。

他所做的每一個動作似乎都讓聲音變得更加緊迫，//“不要離開我們，拯救我們。” 來到水邊。  我們可以拯救你，你也可以拯救我們。 '//

他必須有意識地努力阻止已故親人呼喚他的聲音。  他幾乎沒有聽到布卡瓦克號從他身後的水中升起。

拉瘋狂地爬了起來，拼命想要逃跑，儘管已經太晚了。  

這些生物移動得如此之快，很難用視線追踪，它們向前猛衝，尾巴猛烈地旋轉，抓住拉的喉嚨。  拉掙扎著，雙臂抓住那條有力的尾巴，但似乎沒有任何作用。  

它把拉扔到地上，用它的一隻前爪把他釘在地上，又長又粗的手指掐住了他的脖子。  

布卡瓦克咆哮著，當它腐臭的呼吸沖刷到拉身上時，它的喉嚨後部發出輕柔的滴答聲。

拉與該生物強大的抓握作鬥爭，首先變身為更大的形態，希望能擊退它，然後迅速變小，希望打破它的抓握。 

一直以來，這個生物都低頭看著拉，當它窒息了他的生命時，不知何故看起來很高興。

當他的視力開始衰退時，他可以看到視野邊緣有運動，就在他能看清的地方之外。  當他開始失去意識時，水中的聲音似乎越來越近，咕咕地叫著，鼓勵著他。

他最後想到的是哈索爾，而這個世界，在布卡瓦克收緊抓握之前，骨頭磨碎和斷裂的聲音幾乎消失在該生物勝利的咆哮中。

結尾。



或者也許您更願意在這些事件發生之前返回 Atet，就好像這一切從未發生過一樣？

"No,"  The way she says is makes him question her sincerity, "It was just quicker than I had expected."

"These pleasures of the flesh, I have never felt such an intense physical sensation before in my life that did not involve pain.  Such pleasure is intoxicating and overwhelming,"  Ra admits.

Hathor reaches out, rubbing the slowly wilting penis with her fingertips.  It almost instantly begins to harden again, "Then perhaps it is practice that you need, so that you might bask in the pleasure rather than be consumed by it."

//Who am I do deny such an offer?//  He thinks, feeling mildly amused as he feels her coax him back to full hardness.

passages.content_zh:
“不，”她說話的方式讓他質疑她的誠意，“只是比我預想的要快。”

「這些肉體的快樂，我一生中從未感受到如此強烈的身體感覺，而且不涉及疼痛。這種快樂是令人陶醉和壓倒性的，」Ra承認。

哈索爾伸出手，用指尖摩擦著慢慢枯萎的陰莖。  它幾乎立刻又開始變硬，“那麼也許你需要的是練習，這樣你就可以沐浴在快樂中，而不是被它吞噬。”

//我是誰，竟然拒絕這樣的提議？ //他想，當他感覺到她把他哄回到完全冷漠時，他感到有點好笑。

[[稍後。 ]]<<將 $RaCherry 設定為「popped」>>

passages.name: Three months later.
passages.content:
Ra stands at Atet's bridge, one hand above a control console as he looks out the view screen.  

<<if $RaCherry is "popped">>As he gazes down on the bustling village below the hovering ship, he sees Hathor step to his side out of the corner of his eye.  One of her hands clasps his own, her fingers interlacing with his, and she leans lightly against his side as she has grown fond of doing.

//She is a rare creature this Hathor.  She is smart, and full of life.//  Ra looks over at her, smiling slightly, //And if I am being honest with myself, I have started to grow fond of her over these last months.//

He gives her hand a little squeeze, causing her to smile, then releases her hand.

//But no matter how much I would like it, even surrounded by these people, I still feel impossibly alone.//

<<else>>As he gazes down on the bustling village below the hovering ship, he sees Hathor move close to him, standing near enough to touch if he so desired, but far enough away to remain apart.

His mind flashes back to that first night, //She undressed herself, seeking to share my bed for the night.  Yet she has never been so forward with me again.  I wonder if she still thinks of that night?//  Ra quickly pushes the thought aside. 

Turning toward her, she gives her a faint smile, one that draws a returning smile from her before she looks down at the deck beneath her feet. 

//She is a rare creature this Hathor.  She is smart, and full of life.//  Ra thinks to himself, //And if I am being honest with myself, I have started to grow fond of her over these last months.//

<</if>>Both hands go to the console before him, Atet groans softly as the ship begins to descend.  Once all of the commands are entered, Ra looks back at the city as it becomes larger on the view screen before him.

Everything is a hive of activity.  People scurrying about as they work, from here it is impossible to see the people glancing up at the ship in wonder, but Ra can almost feel their eyes.  //This is beca
passages.content_zh:
Ra 站在 Atet 的艦橋上，一隻手放在控制台上，一邊看著螢幕。  

<<如果$RaCherry被「彈出」>>當他俯視懸浮船下方熙熙攘攘的村莊時，他從眼角余光中看到哈索爾走到了他身邊。  她的一隻手握住他的手，手指與他的手指交錯，她輕輕靠在他身邊，就像她越來越喜歡做的那樣。

//她是哈索爾的稀有生物。  她很聰明，充滿活力。 // Ra 看著她，微微一笑，//如果我對自己誠實的話，在過去的幾個月裡我已經開始喜歡她了。 //

他輕輕捏捏她的手，讓她微笑，然後放開她的手。

//但無論我多麼願意，即使被這些人包圍，我仍然感到不可能的孤獨。 //

<<其他>>當他俯視懸浮船下方熙熙攘攘的村莊時，他看到哈索爾向他靠近，如果他願意的話，站得足夠近，可以觸摸，但又足夠遠，可以保持距離。

他的思緒閃回第一個晚上，//她脫掉衣服，想和我共用一張床過夜。  但她再也沒有對我這麼主動過。  我不知道她是否還記得那晚？ // Ra 很快就把這個想法拋到了一邊。 

她轉向她，給了她一個淡淡的微笑，在她低頭看著腳下的甲板之前，她也回以微笑。 

//她是哈索爾的稀有生物。  她很聰明，充滿活力。 // Ra 心裡想，//如果我對自己誠實的話，在過去的幾個月裡我已經開始喜歡她了。 //

<</if>>雙手伸向前方的控制台，當飛船開始下降時，阿特輕輕地呻吟了一聲。  輸入所有命令後，Ra 回頭看著城市，因為它在他面前的視圖螢幕上變得更大。

一切都是活動的蜂巢。  人們忙著工作，從這裡看不到人們驚奇地抬頭看這艘船，但 Ra 幾乎能感覺到他們的眼睛。  //這是因為

passages.name: Falcon penis.
passages.content:
Ra draws upon the falcon DNA stored in his body.  He takes his time, allowing the transformation to come slowly.  

His skin ripples, stretching unnaturally before feathers seem to crawl from beneath the skin.  A sound like a sigh escapes his lips as his face starts to pull forward, his blue green skin slowly fading toward yellow as the beak begins to form, the very tip darkening toward black to create a sharp contrast.

//It always hurts less when I can take my time.//  Ra reflects.

As he blinks, he realizes that his vision has started to enhance, small details that his keen eyes would have missed come into crystal clarity.

Ra focuses his mind, maintaining his humanoid form as the falcon characteristics emerge.  His toes begin to curl and harden, talons clacking against the deck plating beneath his feet.

Across from him, Hathor watches, a certain reverence in her eyes as she takes in the sight of him.  The intensity of her gaze suggests that she is trying to memorize every detail of the change.

By the time he's done, his body is covered in feathers, soft downy feathers across his belly and chest while heavier feathers adorn his arms and back.  His head however is the most striking, looking far more bird like than human.

Hathor's eyes however seem focused on a point lower on his body, the pointed avian penis standing at attention between his legs.

There is myrth in her eyes as she turns slowly, her body moving like that of a cat.  She doesn't stop until her ass is pointed at him, her half lidded eyes looking over one shoulder toward him invitingly.  With one hand, she pulls her garments up past her hips, exposing her naked bottom to his view.

Ra stretches his arms, the air in the room moving as hes wings spread to fill the space around him.  Part of him wants to flap his arms again as he lunges toward Hathor, but he resists the urge.  Instead, he takes several steps toward her, careful not to step on any of the pillows strewn about the room for fear of tearin
passages.content_zh:
Ra 利用儲存在他體內的獵鷹 DNA。  他慢慢來，讓轉變慢慢發生。  

他的皮膚出現波紋，不自然地伸展，然後羽毛似乎從皮膚下爬出。  當他的臉開始向前拉時，他的嘴唇發出一聲嘆息般的聲音，隨著喙開始形成，他的藍綠色皮膚慢慢褪色為黃色，尖端變暗為黑色，形成鮮明的對比。

//當我能慢慢來時，傷害總是會減輕一些。 // Ra 反映道。

當他眨眼時，他意識到自己的視力開始增強，他敏銳的眼睛可能會錯過的小細節變得清晰可見。

拉集中註意力，在獵鷹特徵顯現時保持其人形形態。  他的腳趾開始捲曲變硬，爪子在腳下的甲板上嘎嘎作響。

哈索爾在他對面注視著他，當她看到他時，眼神中帶著某種敬畏。  她凝視的強度表明她正在努力記住變化的每一個細節。

當他完成時，他的身體上覆蓋著羽毛，柔軟的絨毛遍布他的腹部和胸部，而較重的羽毛裝飾著他的手臂和背部。  然而，他的頭是最引人注目的，看起來更像鳥而不是人。

然而，哈索爾的目光似乎集中在他身體下方的一個點上，尖尖的鳥類陰莖立正立在他的兩腿之間。

她的眼睛充滿了神話，她慢慢地轉身，身體像貓一樣移動。  直到她的屁股指向他，她才停下來，半睜的眼睛越過肩膀誘人地看著他。  她用一隻手將衣服拉過臀部，將赤裸的臀部暴露在他的視野中。

拉動伸展雙臂，房間裡的空氣流動起來，他的翅膀張開，填滿了他周圍的空間。  當他衝向哈索爾時，他的一部分想要再次揮動手臂，但他抵制住了這種衝動。  相反，他向她走了幾步，小心翼翼地不踩到房間裡散落的任何一個枕頭，以免撕裂。

passages.name: Q2D1
passages.content:
Ra glides toward the ground, starting his transformation into a canine even before he reaches the ground.  Taloned claws become large paws as his weight is placed on them, then upward as his body seems to burst upward.  Bit by bit the changes come over him, feathers being replaced by dark brown fur.

As the last of his beak vanishes into his face, Ra flexes his jaw once, revealing a mouth full of sharp teeth, then turns his eyes to his surroundings.

Carefully, he begins to move toward the mound.  He starts to cross the distance swiftly, each paw placed carefully in the hopes of not making any form of sound that the Cthonians can sense through the ground.

Every step he takes, he knows that it is a risk.  His eyes dart over the surrounding grounds for any sign of the Cthonians that clearly inhabit this area, //It's a small nest.  From the rot, I'd guess no more than two or three of them.  Maybe I'm lucky and they're hunting.//

No sooner has that thought crossed his mind that he hears the clatter of bones somewhere near the mound.  

Ra freezes in place, adrenaline coursing white hot through his veins.  //Maybe it wasn't one of them,//  He knows his thoughts are a lie even as he thinks them, //Or maybe it hasn't noticed me yet?//

The subtle movement of earth to his right is all the answer he needs.  Springing into motion, Ra runs toward the mound with every bit of speed he can manage.  Head low and all four legs a blur of motion as he moves as fast as he can.

But his best is not quite good enough.

The ground ripples as the Cthonian moves beneath it, surging toward him.  Then with a burst of dirt and rock, it emerges from the ground.  Perhaps twice as long as a man is tall, the creature hurls itself through the air, it's sickly purple skin somehow fitting of the rot that permeates the area.  Leading the way is a cluster of long pink tentacles, wicked looking white barbs lining their undersides.  Faster than Ra can blink. the tentacles lash out, grabbing him and pu
passages.content_zh:
拉向地面滑行，在到達地面之前就開始變身為犬科動物。  當他的重量壓在爪子上時，爪子會變成大爪子，然後當他的身體似乎向上爆炸時向上。  他的身上一點一點地發生了變化，羽毛被深棕色的皮毛所取代。

當他的最後一張喙消失在他的臉上時，拉彎曲了他的下巴，露出了一張佈滿鋒利牙齒的嘴，然後將目光轉向了周圍的環境。

他小心翼翼地開始向土丘移動。  他開始迅速地跨越距離，每隻爪子都小心翼翼地放置，希望不要發出任何克索尼亞人能透過地面感覺到的聲音。

他每走一步，他都知道這是一個風險。  他的目光掃視周圍的地面，尋找明顯居住在該地區的克索尼亞人的任何跡象，//這是一個小巢穴。  從腐爛程度來看，我猜不會超過兩三個。  也許我很幸運，他們正在狩獵。 //

這個念頭剛閃過他的腦海，他就聽到土丘附近傳來骨頭碰撞的聲音。  

拉僵在原地，腎上腺素在他的血管中流淌得白熱化。  //也許它不是其中之一，//即使他這麼認為，他也知道自己的想法是謊言，//或者也許它還沒有註意到我？ //

地球在他右邊的微妙運動就是他所需要的全部答案。  拉一躍而起，以他所能達到的速度向土丘跑去。  當他盡可能快地移動時，頭低著，四條腿都在運動。

但他的最好成績還不夠好。

當克索尼亞人在其下方移動時，地面泛起漣漪，向他湧來。  然後伴隨著一陣泥土和岩石的爆裂聲，它從地下出現了。  這種生物的身長大約是人類身高的兩倍，它把自己拋向空中，它那病態的紫色皮膚在某種程度上與瀰漫在該地區的腐爛現像很相配。  領路的是一簇長長的粉紅色觸手，它們的底面排列著看起來邪惡的白色倒刺。  比 Ra 眨眼的速度還要快。觸手猛烈攻擊，抓住了他和pu

passages.name: Q6C1
passages.content:
Faster than any time he has ever transformed before, Ra forces the change.  Every inch of his body is engulfed in fiery white pain that fades nearly as fast as it starts.

Half feline, Ra hisses in rage as he dances beyond Nyarlathotep's reach.  He pivots, then hurls himself at the horror.  Deftly dodging Nyarlathotep's grasp, he has a split second of hope, hope that he could somehow survive this.

Then a vice like grip closes around his tail, using his own momentum to swing him around and slam him against the wall with such bone breaking force that he can feel his flesh rupture.  

Looming nearby, watching with a sense of curiosity and amusement, Nyarlathotep watches as Ra dies.  When the last ragged breath leaves Ra's chest, the looming darkness shifts as the Black Pharaoh's attention turns elsewhere.

END.



Or perhaps you would prefer to return to the Atet as if this never happened?

[[Return to the Atet.|Entering Sandbox.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉強制改變的速度比以往任何時候都快。  他身體的每一寸都被熾熱的白色疼痛所吞噬，這種疼痛幾乎和開始時一樣快地消失了。

半貓科動物拉在奈亞拉托提普夠不到的地方跳舞時，憤怒地發出嘶嘶聲。  他轉過身，然後向恐懼撲去。  他巧妙地躲開了奈亞拉托提普的抓握，瞬間燃起了希望，希望自己能以某種方式活下來。

然後，一個像虎鉗一樣的抓握抓住了他的尾巴，利用他自己的動量把他甩到了牆上，用如此之大的力量將他撞到牆上，力道之大讓他能感覺到自己的肉破裂了。  

奈亞拉托提普在附近若隱若現，帶著好奇有趣的心情看著拉死去。  當最後一口氣離開拉的胸口時，迫在眉睫的黑暗隨著黑法老的注意力轉向別處而轉移。

結尾。



或者也許您更願意回到 Atet，就好像這件事從未發生過一樣？

[[返回Atet。 |進入沙盒。 ]]

passages.name: And so our tale begins.
passages.content:
The solar ship Atet had traveled a millennia through the space between stars, fleeing the destruction of it's world of origin, Ptah.  She was never intended to see use as a military vessel, but even so the ship shows signs of heavy battle damage.

As the ship passes a nearby solar system, automated systems scan the sun and the planets that surround it. 

For the first time in the ship's long journey, the scanners detected a habitable that had not been laid to waste by the war the ship was fleeing.

More active scans begin, seeking out any sign of the dreaded enemy and the broken barren worlds that are left in their wake.

A closer scan detects traces of the enemy, as if their kind had passed through the solar system in the distant past but did not linger for long.

Lights begin to flicker to life as additional ship's systems come to life.  The life pod of the last surviving member of the ship's crew, possibly the last surviving member of it's race, flickers and makes a soft whirring sound.  Within seconds a digital readout flashes to life and displays characters in an alien language.

[img[images/Ship.png]]

When the front of the survival pod folds open, a blue green man gasps, his large oval eyes flying wide.  There's a look of panic in his features as he scrambles naked from the pod.

Overall, he looks much like a human, only taller and with a head that is elongated.  His eyes are oval shaped and solid black.

He looks around frantically, searching for any sign of danger, then dashes to the computer station where he begins typing in commands.  

Within seconds, he finds the information he was seeking, //No signs of pursuit.//

Nearly weeping in relief, he takes a deep breath to steady himself before typing in several more commands.

//A planet, Much like Ptah.  Traces of the hated enemy having visited the system, but no sign of their habitation.  And most encouraging, signs of primitive life untouched by the enemy's corruption.//

Sitting heavily in the chair at t
passages.content_zh:
太陽船阿特號已經在星際空間中航行了千年，逃離了它的起源世界普塔的毀滅。  她從未打算被用作軍艦，但即便如此，這艘船仍顯示出嚴重戰鬥損壞的跡象。

當太空船經過附近的太陽系時，自動化系統會掃描太陽及其周圍的行星。 

在這艘船的長途旅行中，掃描器第一次發現了一個沒有被這艘船逃離的戰爭摧毀的可居住的地方。

更積極的掃描開始，尋找可怕的敵人和他們身後留下的破碎貧瘠世界的任何跡象。

近距離掃描可以發現敵人的痕跡，就好像他們的同類在遙遠的過去就穿過了太陽系，但並沒有停留太久。

隨著其他船舶系統的啟動，燈光開始閃爍。  最後一名倖存的船員（可能是該種族中最後一名倖存的成員）的救生艙閃爍並發出輕微的呼呼聲。  幾秒鐘之內，數字讀數就會閃爍起來，並以外星語言顯示字元。

[img[圖片/Ship.png]]

當救生艙的前部打開時，一個藍綠色的男人喘著氣，他的橢圓形大眼睛睜得大大的。  當他赤裸裸地從吊艙裡爬出來時，他的臉上露出了驚慌的表情。

整體而言，他看起來很像人類，只是更高，頭也更長。  他的眼睛呈橢圓形，純黑色。

他瘋狂地環顧四周，尋找任何危險的跡象，然後衝向電腦站，開始輸入指令。  

幾秒鐘之內，他就找到了他正在尋找的信息，//沒有追擊的跡象。 //

他鬆了一口氣，差點哭了，他深吸了一口氣，讓自己冷靜下來，然後又輸入了幾個命令。

//一顆行星，很像普塔。  令人憎惡的敵人曾經造訪過該星系的痕跡，但沒有他們居住的跡象。  最令人鼓舞的是，原始生命的跡象並沒有受到敵人腐敗的影響。 //

重重地坐在椅子上

passages.name: Horrors
passages.content:
<<back>>

!Greater Evils:
<<if $blackPharoah is "true">>!The Black Pharaoh, Nyarlathotep:
Capable of taking any form, the Black Pharaoh is known for his trickery and dark humor.  Though he is on Earth, it would seem that his motives do not entirely align with the other Great Old Ones.  Ra's first meeting with Nyarlathotep left him perplexed and terrified, but ultimately still alive.

<</if>><<if $hydra is "true">>!Hydra:
A vampiric entity living not on the blood of it's victims, but on their brains and heads.  This creature lives in the void between stars, though some speculate that it may live outside of time and space entirely. Hydra consumes the brains of intelligent creatures of all worlds he can reach, learning what its victims know through the ingesting of their brain tissue before making their heads part of itself like macabre trophies.

<</if>><<if $Bukavac is "true">>!Bukavac:
A massive reptilian creature with six legs and gnarled horns.  It lives in and around lakes and ponds, coming out of the water to seek prey.  Known by both it's horrible scream and for the perverse pleasure it takes in strangling it's victims.

<</if>>

!Lesser Evils:
<<if $cthonian is "true">>!Cthonians:
Massive worm like creatures capable of growing to truly massive sizes.  The main part of their body is long and slender with a sickly purple shade that matches the corpses they gather.  At the front they have dozens of long pink tentacles lined with sharp white barbs that they use to grasp their prey.  They will kill anything and their appetite knows no bounds.  They will often pile the remains of their victims near their nesting grounds.

<</if>><<if $ghouls is "true">>!Ghouls:
Ghouls, while insignificant compared to many of the horrors employed by the greater evils, still pose a significant threat.  Roughly humanoid but with elongated faces and gaping maws of sharp teeth there is only a hint of similarity between them and the host body they are created from.  They are easily ten ti
passages.content_zh:
<<返回>>

！更大的邪惡：
<<如果 $blackPharoah 是「true」>>！黑法老，奈亞拉托提普：
黑法老能夠以任何形式出現，以其詭計和黑色幽默而聞名。  儘管他在地球上，但他的動機似乎並不完全與其他舊日支配者一致。  拉與奈亞拉托提普的第一次見面讓他感到困惑和恐懼，但最終仍然活著。

<</if>><<如果 $Hydra 為「true」>>！ Hydra：

passages.name: Evening Party.
passages.content:
The next few hours are a flurry of activity.  Children trying to sneak peeks at him from around small structures.  Adults scrambling about, preparing a feast in his honor.  The females of the village being paraded before him one after another.  And all the while Hathor is always near, watching him.  The whole situation comes off as more than a little overwhelming and he has no idea how he should respond to any of it.  

So he sits, and he waits, hoping that once the festivities die down a bit that he can begin to set plans in motion.

The sun has just reached the horizon when the food begins to be brought out for consumption.  Ra is aware of the sun's warmth on his back, and realizes that from where he is sitting, it must look like the sun is setting behind him to many of those present.

<<if $sunGod is "true">>//Good, it is important that I make a profound impression on these people.//

"Do we displease you?"  Hathor asks softly as she approaches, a platter of food in her hands.

Ra reaches out, selecting an item at random from the platter, //I should have paid more attention to their foods when I was studying them.  I've no idea if these things will nourish me at all.//

Taking a slow bite, he finds the dark dried fruit to be mildly sweet and chewy, //These are pleasant enough,//  He thinks to himself.

Swallowing what is in his mouth, he finally replies to her inquiry, "Your people's kindness and generosity pleases me.  Why do you believe you have not pleased me?"

Hathor looks uncomfortable, her eyes sharp as she appears to gather her thoughts before replying.

//She is wise, to weigh her words before speaking speaks highly of her ability to reason.//

"Many here are concerned that we are being tested.  You come before us, a God, yet you make no demands, and when we present our unclaimed women to you, you take no interest."  Hathor meets his eyes, but it's an unsteady gaze, as if she's uncertain if meeting his eyes is the right thing to do.

Ra feels a smile tug
passages.content_zh:
接下来的几个小时是一系列的活动。  孩子们试图从小建筑物周围偷看他。  大人们争先恐后地为他准备盛宴。  村里的女人纷纷在他面前游行。  而哈索尔始终在附近，注视着他。  整個情況讓人有點不知所措，他不知道該如何應對。  

於是他坐下來，等待著，希望一旦慶祝活動稍微平息下來，他就可以開始擬定計畫。

當太陽剛升到地平線時，食物就開始被端出來食用。  拉意識到太陽照在他背上的溫暖，並意識到從他坐的地方看，對在場的許多人來說，看起來一定是太陽正在他身後落下。

<<if $sunGod is "true">>//很好，給這些人留下深刻的印像很重要//

「我們讓你不高興了嗎？」當她走近時，哈索爾輕聲問道，她手裡端著一盤食物。

Ra伸出手，從盤子裡隨機選擇了一個項目，//當我研究他們的時候，我應該更加註意他們的食物。  我不知道这些东西是否能滋养我。 //

慢慢地咬了一口，他發現深色的乾果略帶甜味，很有嚼勁，//這些已經足夠令人愉快了，//他心裡想。

嚥下嘴裡的東西，他終於回答了她的詢問：“你們人民的善良和慷慨讓我很高興。為什麼你認為你沒有讓我高興呢？”

哈索爾看起來很不舒服，她的眼睛很銳利，她似乎在回答之前整理了一下思緒。

//她很聰明，說話前先掂量一下，充分說明了她的推理能力。 //

「這裡的許多人擔心我們正在接受考驗。你作為上帝來到我們面前，但你沒有提出任何要求，當我們向你展示無人認領的婦女時，你沒有興趣。」哈索爾與他的目光對視，但眼神不穩定，彷彿她不確定與他的目光對視是否是正確的做法。

Ra 感覺到一絲微笑

passages.name: Some time later.
passages.content:
Ra looks at Hathor, sleeping on the pile of pillows beside him, //There is a beauty to this creature,//  He thinks.  

He watches her for a few seconds, her naked chest rising and falling as she breathes.  But after a little while he decides that he has other matters that need to be attended.

[[Explore the City.]]
[[Visit the temples.]]
[[Oversee the Pyramid site.]]
[[Walk along the Nile.]]
[[Travel to the Oasis.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉看著哈索爾，睡在他旁邊的一堆枕頭上，//這個生物有一種美麗，//他想。  

他看了她幾秒鐘，她赤裸的胸膛隨著她的呼吸而起伏。  但過了一會兒，他決定他還有其他事情要處理。

[[探索城市。 ]]
[[參觀寺廟。 ]]
[[監督金字塔站點。 ]]
[[沿著尼羅河漫步。 ]]
[[前往綠洲。 ]]

passages.name: End.
passages.content:
"Hathor?"  Ra's voice wakes her from a fitful slumber.  She nearly weeps when she sees him, springing from the silky smooth sheets covering her body to embrace him.

"He failed,"  Ra's voice purrs in Hathor's ear.

Hathor pulls back suddenly, trying to make sense of what Ra is saying, her brow creasing.

"I told him, I told him that if he failed me that I'd come for you.  All he had to do is enter the rift, distract //her// long enough for me to alter a few of the runes and lock her away on the other side,"  Hathor's expression twists in a horrified realization, "But instead his death served no purpose."

The form of Ra slowly fades away, being replaced by the Black Pharaoh.  In spite of Hathor's struggles, she can not even budge his grip.

"I told him that if he failed, I'd make you scream for time without end, and every time you screamed I would be wearing his face,"  There's a cold sort of sadness in his tone, "But first, we will watch this world end, together."

END.
passages.content_zh:
「哈索爾？」 拉的聲音將她從斷斷續續的睡夢中喚醒。  當她看到他時，她幾乎哭了，從覆蓋她身體的絲滑床單中跳出來擁抱他。

「他失敗了，」拉的聲音在哈索爾耳邊響起。

哈索爾突然退後一步，皺起眉頭，試圖理解拉所說的話。

「我告訴他，我告訴他，如果他讓我失敗，我會來找你。他所要做的就是進入裂縫，分散//她的注意力，讓我改變一些符文，並將她鎖在另一邊，」哈索爾的表情因驚恐的意識到而扭曲，“但相反，他的死沒有任何意義。”

拉的形體慢慢消失，取而代之的是黑法老。  儘管哈索爾奮力掙扎，她甚至無法鬆開他的手。

「我告訴他，如果他失敗了，我會讓你無休止地尖叫，每次你尖叫的時候，我都會戴上他的臉，」他的語氣裡有一種冰冷的悲傷，“但首先，我們會一起看著這個世界的終結。”

結尾。

passages.name: Q2S1
passages.content:
Ra glides toward the ground, letting the crocodile genetic code to partially manifest itself.  His body expands, nearly doubling his normal size.  At the same time the heathers that cover his body become the thick leathery hide of a crocodile.

Within a few seconds, Ra is a towering, powerfully built creature, largely crocodile, but still himself to a point where he can maintain a bipedal form and use his hands.

With a grim sort of grin splitting his face, pointy teeth on full display, he looks upon the mound, then at the earth all around him.

//This form is strong, and I am tired of running,//  Raising one foot, he slams it to the ground, knowing full well that it will draw any Cthonian in the area.

He is not disappointed.  In the seconds that follow, he sees a furrow in the ground racing toward him, then a second later a second coming from a different direction. 

Ra flexes, knowing that in this form he is a match for one of the worm like creatures when they are this small, but also knowing that they're going to be faster than he is.

Bracing himself, he prepares for the closest one.  When it bursts from the ground in a shower of dirt and stone, he's already in motion.  With both hands, he reaches out to grab a fist full of fleshy pink tentacles in each hand, the sickly purple body behind them still contorting with the effort of is rapid exit from the ground.  

The very moment his hands grasp the tentacles Ra pivots, using the creature's own momentum to spin it through the air just in time to use it like a club to smash into the second one.  The impact is enough to sever the tentacles in his hands, sending a spray of puss like pink fluids spattering over the area.

Not wanting to give up his advantage for even a second, Ra hurls himself after the creatures, slamming a massive taloned foot down on the injured Cthonian with bone jarring force several times before turning his attention back to the other only to find it already burrowing back into the ground.

Rea
passages.content_zh:
拉向地面滑行，讓鱷魚遺傳密碼部分顯現出來。  他的身體膨脹了，幾乎是正常尺寸的兩倍。  同時，覆蓋他身體的石楠花變成了鱷魚厚厚的皮革。

幾秒鐘之內，拉就變成了一個高大、強壯的生物，大部分是鱷魚，但他仍然可以保持雙足形態並使用雙手。

他臉上露出一絲冷酷的笑容，尖利的牙齒完全露出來，他看著土丘，然後看著周圍的大地。

//這個形態很強大，我厭倦了奔跑，//抬起一隻腳，他將它猛地踩在地上，他很清楚這會吸引該地區的任何克索尼亞人。

他並不失望。  在接下來的幾秒鐘裡，他看到地面上的一道溝壑正向他衝來，然後一秒鐘後又從另一個方向傳來。 

Ra 彎曲了身體，知道在這種形態下，他可以與一隻如此小的蠕蟲生物相媲美，但也知道它們會比他更快。

他做好了準備，準備迎接最近的一場。  當它從地面冒出一陣泥土和石頭時，他就已經開始行動了。  他雙手伸出，雙手各抓起一隻佈滿肉粉色觸手的拳頭，背後那病態的紫色身體還在用力的扭曲著，正在快速從地面鑽出。  

就在他的手抓住觸手的那一刻，拉旋轉，利用生物自身的動量將其在空中旋轉，正好像一根棍子一樣用它猛擊第二個。  衝擊力足以切斷他手中的觸手，並在該區域噴灑出粉紅色液體般的膿液。

拉一秒鐘都不想放棄自己的優勢，他猛撲向這些生物，用一隻巨大的利爪腳用骨頭震動的力量猛擊受傷的克托尼亞人好幾次，然後他將注意力轉回到另一隻腳上，卻發現它已經鑽回了地下。

雷阿

passages.name: Q2S2
passages.content:
Comforted that the immediate threat has passed, his thoughts turn to the runes themselves, wondering who created them and if they will try to open another portal.

"Atet, monitor this area for signs of other portals, make it a priority."

Then without further thought, he works the controls, directing the solar barge back to Egypt.

[[Return to Egypt.|Entering Sandbox.]]<<set $Story2 to "end">>
passages.content_zh:
眼前的威脅已經過去，他感到很欣慰，他的思緒轉向了符文本身，想知道是誰創造了它們，以及它們是否會嘗試打開另一個傳送門。

“阿特，監視這個區域是否有其他傳送門的跡象，優先處理。”

然後，他沒有多想，就操作控制裝置，引導太陽能駁船返回埃及。

[[返回埃及。 |進入沙盒。 ]]<<將 $Story2 設定為「結束」>>

passages.name: First Quest 3c
passages.content:
Ra pivots toward the sound, his eyes falling on something he hoped never to see on this world.  Even as he moves, his body begins to shift, his instinctive need to defend himself causing him to manifest the canine DNA in his body.  The change comes rapidly and painfully his body contorting into the powerful form of the dog, fur sprouting from his skin in a wave.

Not for even a fraction of a second does he allow his gaze to leave the creature before him.

This one lacks the sickly blue tinge of those he's seen before, instead given its human origin it has a pasty gray skin instead.  Easily head and shoulders taller than Ra, and him being taller than most of the humans he finds himself living among, the creature is imposing to say the least.  Its hands and feet are stretched impossibly long, becoming long black claws he knows full fell could cleave him in two.  Ribs and bones seem to protrude everywhere, giving the creature a nearly skeletal appearance.  From its groin dangles a flaccid penis, nearly as long as its thighs so that it almost reaches its knees.  But most unsettling is the face.  While the rest of the body is shaped much like the human it was created from, the face holds no resemblance at all.

Its face is long, shaped more like a dog than anything else Ra is familiar with.  Sharp jagged teeth fill a mouth that can barely close around them.  Flared nostrils perched above lips that seem pealed back to reveal the bloodless pink gums.  Long pointed ears lay back across its skull as if they are unable to stand fully on their own.  

Most striking however is the eyes.  In the past, the ones he has seen were created from his own people, the usually black eyes turning to a deep shade of green.  This one's eyes are a solid blood red and looking directly at him.

Before the ghoul can move, Ra is already in motion.  He lunges at the creature, his sharp canine teeth sinking into the flesh of the creature's neck and filling his mouth with the rancid taste of their t
passages.content_zh:
拉轉向聲音的方向，他的目光落在了他希望永遠不會在這個世界上看到的東西上。  即使在他移動時，他的身體也開始發生變化，他保護自己的本能需要導致他在體內顯現出犬類 DNA。  這種變化來得迅速而痛苦，他的身體扭曲成狗的強大形態，毛皮從他的皮膚上波浪般地長出來。

他的目光一刻也沒有離開眼前的生物。

它不像他以前見過的那樣帶有病態的藍色調，相反，考慮到它的人類起源，它的皮膚是蒼白的灰色。  很容易就比拉高了一個頭和肩膀，而且他比他生活在其中的大多數人類都高，這個生物至少可以說是令人印象深刻的。  它的手和腳被拉伸得不可思議的長，變成了長長的黑色爪子，他知道如果完全抓到的話可能會將他劈成兩半。  肋骨和骨頭似乎到處突出，使該生物看起來幾乎是骷髏。  它的腹股溝處懸掛著一根鬆弛的陰莖，幾乎與大腿一樣長，幾乎達到了膝蓋。  但最讓人不安的還是臉。  雖然身體其他部位的形狀很像人類，但臉部卻一點也不像。

它的臉很長，形狀比拉熟悉的任何東西都更像狗。  鋒利的鋸齒狀牙齒填滿了一張幾乎無法閉合的嘴巴。  張開的鼻孔位於嘴唇之上，嘴唇似乎被剝落，露出了毫無血色的粉紅色牙齦。  長而尖的耳朵向後貼在頭骨上，彷彿無法完全獨立站立。  

然而最引人注目的是眼睛。  以前他見過的都是自己人創造出來的，平常黑色的眼睛變成了深綠色。  此人的雙眼赤紅，直視著他。

在食屍鬼移動之前，拉已經開始行動了。  他向這個生物猛撲過去，鋒利的犬齒深深地陷入了這個生物脖子的肉裡，讓他的嘴裡充滿了它們的腐臭味道。

Ra pivots toward the sound, his eyes falling on something he hoped never to see on this world.  Even as he moves, his body begins to shift, his instinctive need to flee causing him to manifest the falcon DNA in his body.  The change comes rapidly and painfully his body contorting into a mush smaller form as feathers burst from his skin.  

Not for even a fraction of a second does he allow his gaze to leave the creature before him.

This one lacks the sickly blue tinge of those he's seen before, instead given its human origin it has a pasty gray skin instead.  Easily head and shoulders taller than Ra, and him being taller than most of the humans he finds himself living among, the creature is imposing to say the least.  Its hands and feet are stretched impossibly long, becoming long black claws he knows full fell could cleave him in two.  Ribs and bones seem to protrude everywhere, giving the creature a nearly skeletal appearance.  From its groin dangles a flaccid penis, nearly as long as its thighs so that it almost reaches its knees.  But most unsettling is the face.  While the rest of the body is shaped much like the human it was created from, the face holds no resemblance at all.

Its face is long, shaped more like a dog than anything else Ra is familiar with.  Sharp jagged teeth fill a mouth that can barely close around them.  Flared nostrils perched above lips that seem pealed back to reveal the bloodless pink gums.  Long pointed ears lay back across its skull as if they are unable to stand fully on their own.  

Most striking however is the eyes.  In the past, the ones he has seen were created from his own people, the usually black eyes turning to a deep shade of green.  This one's eyes are a solid blood red and looking directly at him.

Ra takes it all in faster than any human could, less than a second passes between the time he lays eyes on the creature and the time he's committed nearly every detail to memory.

With a blur of motion, the ghoul lunges at Ra,
passages.content_zh:
拉轉向聲音的方向，他的目光落在了他希望永遠不會在這個世界上看到的東西上。  即使在他移動時，他的身體也開始發生變化，他本能的逃跑需求導致他在體內顯現出獵鷹 DNA。  這種變化來得迅速而痛苦，他的身體扭曲成一個更小的形狀，羽毛從他的皮膚上爆裂出來。  

他的目光一刻也沒有離開眼前的生物。

它不像他以前見過的那樣帶有病態的藍色調，相反，考慮到它的人類起源，它的皮膚是蒼白的灰色。  很容易就比拉高了一個頭和肩膀，而且他比他生活在其中的大多數人類都高，這個生物至少可以說是令人印象深刻的。  它的手和腳被拉伸得不可思議的長，變成了長長的黑色爪子，他知道如果完全抓到的話可能會將他劈成兩半。  肋骨和骨頭似乎到處突出，使該生物看起來幾乎是骷髏。  它的腹股溝處懸掛著一根鬆弛的陰莖，幾乎與大腿一樣長，幾乎達到了膝蓋。  但最讓人不安的還是臉。  雖然身體其他部位的形狀很像人類，但臉部卻一點也不像。

它的臉很長，形狀比拉熟悉的任何東西都更像狗。  鋒利的鋸齒狀牙齒填滿了一張幾乎無法閉合的嘴巴。  張開的鼻孔位於嘴唇之上，嘴唇似乎被剝落，露出了毫無血色的粉紅色牙齦。  長而尖的耳朵向後貼在頭骨上，彷彿無法完全獨立站立。  

然而最引人注目的是眼睛。  以前他見過的都是自己人創造出來的，平常黑色的眼睛變成了深綠色。  此人的雙眼赤紅，直視著他。

拉吸收這一切的速度比任何人類都快，從他看到這個生物到他將幾乎所有細節都記在記憶中，只花了不到一秒的時間。

食屍鬼以模糊的動作向拉猛衝，

passages.name: First Quest 3a
passages.content:
Ra pivots toward the sound, his eyes falling on something he hoped never to see on this world.

This one lacks the sickly blue tinge of those he's seen before, instead given its human origin it has a pasty gray skin instead.  Easily head and shoulders taller than Ra, and him being taller than most of the humans he finds himself living among, the creature is imposing to say the least.  Its hands and feet are stretched impossibly long, becoming long black claws he knows full fell could cleave him in two.  Ribs and bones seem to protrude everywhere, giving the creature a nearly skeletal appearance. With a blur of motion, the ghoul lunges at Ra, its clawed feet catching him full in the chest and driving him to the ground with bone breaking force.  It lets out a deep howl, one that is returned from several sources nearby, then begins to savagely slash at his face, neck, and chest with its clawed hands.  

Ra frantically tries to fight the creature off, but deep down he knows it's a loosing battle.  He can see the ghoul's claws coated in his deep blue blood, bits of blue green skin and tissue dangling from its long fingers.  

Strength begins to leave his bo
passages.content_zh:
拉轉向聲音的方向，他的目光落在了他希望永遠不會在這個世界上看到的東西上。

它不像他以前見過的那樣帶有病態的藍色調，相反，考慮到它的人類起源，它的皮膚是蒼白的灰色。  很容易就比拉高了一個頭和肩膀，而且他比他生活在其中的大多數人類都高，這個生物至少可以說是令人印象深刻的。  它的手和腳被拉伸得不可思議的長，變成了長長的黑色爪子，他知道如果完全抓到的話可能會將他劈成兩半。  肋骨和骨頭似乎到處突出，使該生物看起來幾乎是骷髏。  它的腹股溝處懸掛著一根鬆弛的陰莖，幾乎與大腿一樣長，幾乎達到了膝蓋。  但最讓人不安的還是臉。  雖然身體其他部位的形狀很像人類，但臉部卻一點也不像。

它的臉很長，形狀比拉熟悉的任何東西都更像狗。  鋒利的鋸齒狀牙齒填滿了一張幾乎無法閉合的嘴巴。  張開的鼻孔位於嘴唇之上，嘴唇似乎被剝落，露出了毫無血色的粉紅色牙齦。  長而尖的耳朵向後貼在頭骨上，彷彿無法完全獨立站立。

食屍鬼動作模糊，向拉猛衝，爪子足足抓住了他的胸口，用碎骨之力將他推倒在地。  它發出低沉的嚎叫，這是從附近的幾個來源傳回來的，然後開始用帶爪子的手野蠻地砍擊他的臉、脖子和胸部。  

拉瘋狂地試圖擊退這個生物，但內心深處他知道這是一場失敗的戰鬥。  他可以看到食屍鬼的爪子上沾滿了深藍色的血液，長長的手指上懸掛著一些藍綠色的皮膚和組織。  

力量開始離開他的身體

passages.name: Q5END1
passages.content:
"I think he's waking up,"  Amun's voice cuts through the fog that seems to seep into Ra's mind.

The sound of someone else approaching filters through the haze as Ra opens his eyes. 

[img[images/room.jpg]]

Tilting his head to one side, he tries to make sense of what he is seeing.  Amun stands at his side, his arrogant features etched with the faintest hint of concern.  Beside him, Hathor places one hand on the short man's shoulder.

"How,"  Ra rumbles, his throat dry as he tries to speak.

Hathor moves, bringing a glass to his lips to sip.  Meanwhile, Amun speaks, "The battle was won, in large thanks to you.  We think we killed them all, they had been digging tunnels, guards are searching them still, but we've found no further evidence of the ghouls."

Ra swallows, the cool water soothing his throat, "How long?"  He manages, trying to sit up.  As he does so, he realizes that his injured arm is nearly healed, //Must have been out most of the day.//

"About a day.  The battle at the pyramid site happened last night.  It's afternoon now,"  Amun states, his tone taking on more of it's usual arrogance.

"I thought you were with them,"  Ra says, feeling displeasure to admit the truth out loud.

Amun's eyes widen in surprise, then he suddenly laughs.

Hathor looks warily between the two men, but says nothing.

"I do not like you, I've made no secret about that though I //have// tried to show you the respect I feel you deserve,"  There's a defensive tone in his voice as he speaks.  Then he sighs heavily before continuing, "Perhaps both of us should reflect on our behavior toward the other.  We do not have to like one another, but our goals are the same.  I will always do what I believe is right for Egypt, what is right for my people."

There's a long silence that follows his words.

"He brought you here after that battle,"  Hathor says, "People in the city are speaking about how the two if you fought together, how you led the battle, and Amun was at your side helping."

"
passages.content_zh:
「我想他醒了，」阿蒙的聲音劃破了似乎滲入拉腦海的迷霧。

當拉開眼睛時，有人走近的聲音透過薄霧傳來。 

[img[圖片/房間.jpg]]

他把頭偏向一側，試圖理解他所看到的一切。  阿蒙站在他身邊，傲慢的臉上刻著一絲關切。  在他旁邊，哈索爾將一隻手放在矮個子的肩膀上。

「怎麼了，」拉隆隆地說，他試著說話時喉嚨髮乾。

哈索爾動了動，將一杯酒放到唇邊抿了一口。  與此同時，阿蒙說：“這場戰鬥取得了勝利，這在很大程度上要歸功於你。我們認為我們已經把他們都殺了，他們一直在挖掘隧道，守衛仍在搜查他們，但我們沒有發現食屍鬼的進一步證據。”

Ra吞了口水，清涼的水舒緩著喉嚨，「多久？」他努力嘗試坐起來。  當他這樣做時，他意識到他受傷的手臂幾乎痊癒了，//肯定已經出去了一天的大部分時間。 //

「大約一天。金字塔遺址的戰鬥發生在昨晚。現在是下午。」阿蒙說道，他的語氣更多的是一貫的傲慢。

「我以為你和他們在一起，」拉說，對大聲承認事實感到不悅。

阿蒙驚訝地睜大眼睛，然後突然笑了起來。

哈索爾警戒地看著兩個人，但什麼也沒說。

「我不喜歡你，我毫不掩飾這一點，儘管我//已經//試圖向你表示我認為你應得的尊重，」他說話時的聲音中有一種防禦性的語氣。  然後他重重地嘆了口氣，然後繼續說道：“也許我們雙方都應該反思一下我們對待對方的行為。我們不必彼此喜歡，但我們的目標是相同的。我將永遠做我認為對埃及、對我的人民正確的事情。”

他的話過後是長時間的沉默。

“在那場戰鬥之後，他把你帶到了這裡，”哈索爾說，“城裡的人們都在談論如果你們兩人一起戰鬥，你們會如何領導這場戰鬥，而阿蒙會在你們身邊提供幫助。”

」

passages.name: Q5END2
passages.content:
Several days later, Ra finds himself leaning back from the table, laughing softly as Amun speaks to the other important people sitting around the table.  

//With Amun managing much of the city's administration, and overseeing the pyramid site, I'll be able to keep an eye on him, and at the same time I'll be able to focus more of my attention elsewhere,//  Ra's jubilant mood falters, //Besides, it is likely best that they have a leader in place for when I am gone.//

Looking at himself, he can see nothing different visibly, but the corruption inside of him burns like fire, kindling an irrational rage that occasionally bubbles up inside of him. 

His eyes shift to Hathor at his side.  He finds her looking back, a soft smile on her lips, //I wonder if she has noticed my change?  If she has, she has shown no indication of it.//

Hours later, Ra sits beside a sleeping Hathor, his eyes watching the sun rise on the horizon.

passages.content_zh:
幾天后，當阿蒙與坐在桌子旁的其他重要人物交談時，拉發現自己從桌子上向後靠去，輕聲笑起來。  

//隨著阿蒙管理城市的大部分行政事務，並監督金字塔遺址，我將能夠密切關注他，同時我將能夠將更多的注意力集中在其他地方，//拉的興高采烈的情緒動搖了，//此外，當我離開時，他們最好有一個領導者。 //

看著自己，他看不到任何明顯的異樣，但他內心的腐敗卻像火一樣燃燒，點燃了他內心時不時冒出的非理性憤怒。 

他的目光轉向身邊的哈索爾。  他發現她回頭看去，嘴角掛著溫柔的微笑，//我不知道她是否注意到我的變化？  如果她有，她也沒有表現出任何跡象。 //

幾個小時後，拉坐在熟睡的哈索爾旁邊，他的眼睛看著太陽從地平線升起。

[[探索城市。 ]]
[[監督金字塔站點。 ]]
[[沿著尼羅河漫步。 ]]

[[返回Atet。 |進入沙盒。 ]]

passages.name: Explore the City.
passages.content:
Buildings made of sun baked mud bricks line the streets, punctuated by the occasional limestone or sandstone buildings. 

//It's amazing.  Even though the pyramids are being built on schedule, they still have time to grow their city.  It seems like every few days there's another street, and a new temple is being erected every few weeks.//

[img[images/Town.png]]

<<set $random to random(1,4)>><<if $random is 1>>Feeling the urge to feel the wind beneath his wings, Ra draws on the falcon DNA stored within his body.  

He feels a moment of discomfort at his body contracts, forcing his mass into a much smaller form as perfectly formed feathers begin to push through his skin.

His face pinches in discomfort, then the facial expression distorts as his face begins to elongate into a beak.  

After mere seconds a large falcon perches where Ra was just standing.

His powerful wings flap, driving him into the air.  He rapidly gains altitude before turning his keen eyes on the ground far below.  //Falcons have amazing eye sight,//  He reflects as he takes in the details of everything that is happening below.

He circles the city once, taking his time as he watches the world beneath him.

Eventually, he glides toward the ground, allowing his own genetic code to assume prominence as he touches the ground among the people of the city.

When he stands in his true form, the people around him look on with a mix of awe and fear.  Many fall on their faces in positions of worship, others take hesitant steps back or look uncertain of what to do.  

<<else>>The soft sound of crunching gravel beneath his sandaled feet is crisp and clear until he reaches the busier streets of the city.  Once there, the den of noise drowns out the soft sound even though there seems to be a bubble of silence that follows him.  

People around him look on with a mix of awe and fear.  Many fall on their faces in positions of worship, others take hesitant steps back or look uncertain of what to do.  

<</if>><<
passages.content_zh:
街道兩旁矗立著用太陽烘烤的泥磚建造的建築，偶爾還有石灰岩或砂岩建築。 

//太棒了。  儘管金字塔正在按計劃建造，但他們仍然有時間發展他們的城市。  似乎每隔幾天就會出現另一條街道，每隔幾週就會建立一座新寺廟。 //

[img[圖/Town.png]]

<<將 $random 設定為 random(1,4)>><<如果 $random 為 1>> 感受到翅膀下的風的衝動，Ra 吸取了儲存在他體內的獵鷹 DNA。  

他感到一陣不適，因為他的身體收縮，迫使他的質量變得更小，完美的羽毛開始刺穿他的皮膚。

他的臉因不適而緊繃，然後面部表情扭曲，開始拉長成喙。  

僅僅幾秒鐘後，一隻大獵鷹棲息在拉剛剛站著的地方。

他有力的翅膀扇動著，將他推向空中。  他迅速地升高高度，然後將敏銳的目光轉向下方的地面。  //獵鷹有驚人的視力，//他一邊思考著下面發生的一切細節。

他繞著這座城市轉了一圈，慢慢地觀察著腳下的世界。

最終，他滑向地面，當他接觸地面時，他自己的遺傳密碼在城市居民中佔據了顯著地位。

當他以真身站立時，周圍的人都帶著敬畏和恐懼的目光看著他。  許多人跪在敬拜的位置上，其他人則猶豫著後退一步，或者看起來不確定該怎麼做。  

<<其他>>他穿著涼鞋的腳下嘎吱嘎吱的碎石發出的輕柔聲音清脆而清晰，直到他到達城市更繁忙的街道。  一旦到達那裡，噪音的巢穴就會淹沒輕柔的聲音，儘管他身後似乎有一片寂靜的泡沫。  

周圍的人用一種混合著敬畏和恐懼的眼神看著他。  許多人跪在敬拜的位置上，其他人則猶豫著後退一步，或者看起來不確定該怎麼做。  

<</如果>><<

passages.name: First Quest 4c1
passages.content:
This time, Ra draws on the DNA in a different way.  Instead of being in his natural form or in the form of the dog, he shifts into a blend of the two.  A soft whine leaves his lips as the pain of a second rapid transformation washes over him.  He pivots, his paws becoming more hand like but maintaining the the hard nails at the tips of his fingers.  

He pivots toward the sound, his arm coming around as he does so to catch the creature across the chest.  Wide bloodless furrows open on the ghoul's chest as Ra's claws rip it open.

The ghoul seems surprised, staggering back a step, but Ra pushes his advantage before it has a chance to call out to others.  One of Ra's hands swings at the ghoul's head, catching it by the ear and holding on.  He can see the ghoul's lips part in preparation for it's howl of pain, but Ra is too quick.  His other hand comes up and catches the thing by the jaw.  With all his strength he pulls with one hand while following through with the other.  

There's a crack, close to a 'pop' that comes from the thing's neck that is nearly drowned out by Ra's own grunt of exertion.

In the same second that the ghoul's neck breaks, it's body goes limp and falls to the ground in a heap.

Ra barely pays the creature any further thought, instead, he strains his ears, trying to listen for any further sign of trouble.

//Two ghouls, I was lucky,//  The reality of what just happened begins to sink in, Knowing that he's unlikely to repeat such an impressive feat twice, he crouches low and begins to move down the tunnel again.

[[Step inside.|First Quest 5a]]
passages.content_zh:
這一次，Ra 以不同的方式利用 DNA。  他不再是自然形態或狗的形態，而是轉變為兩者的混合體。  當第二次快速轉變的痛苦席捲他時，他的嘴唇發出一聲輕柔的哀鳴。  他轉動身體，爪子變得更像手，但指尖仍保留著堅硬的指甲。  

他轉向聲音的方向，同時轉動手臂，抓住這個生物的胸口。  當拉的爪子將食屍鬼的胸口撕開時，食屍鬼的胸口上出現了寬闊的、沒有血色的皺紋。

食屍鬼似乎很驚訝，踉蹌地後退了一步，但拉在它有機會向其他人喊叫之前就擴大了優勢。  拉的一隻手向食屍鬼的頭部揮去，抓住它的耳朵並緊緊抓住。  他可以看到食屍鬼的嘴唇張開，準備發出痛苦的嚎叫，但拉太快了。  他的另一隻手抬起來，抓住了那東西的下巴。  他用盡全力用一隻手拉，另一手跟著。  

那東西的脖子上發出了一聲近乎「砰」的爆裂聲，幾乎被拉用力發出的咕嚕聲淹沒了。

就在食屍鬼脖子折斷的同一秒，它的身體變得軟綿綿的，摔倒在地。

拉幾乎沒有再多想這個生物，相反，他豎起耳朵，試圖聆聽任何進一步的麻煩跡象。

//兩個食屍鬼，我很幸運，//剛剛發生的事情的現實開始深入人心，知道他不太可能重複這樣令人印象深刻的壯舉兩次，他蹲下身子，開始再次沿著隧道移動。

[[走進去。 |第一個任務 5a]]

passages.name: Two hours later.
passages.content:
"Khara!"  Ra curses as automated landing systems abort.  The message displayed on his monitor displaying the message, 'Landing gear malfunction, pilot input required.'

Grasping at controls he never learned to use properly.  The ship's speed is good and it's trajectory looks correct, but without proper landing gear he knows it is about to be a rough landing.

On the ground through the view port, he can see the shadow of Atet cast on the earth beneath the ship.  The sun at his back as he approaches the ground.  Claxons blare just seconds before he hits the ground, warning passengers, or in this case the ship's sole passenger, of an imminent crash.

For just a split second he allows his eyes to flicker further ahead, to the small village he had selected for his first meeting with members of this race.  But he barely has time to contemplate what they are seeing before his attention is forced back to his own plight.

The ship hits the ground, not as hard as Ra had feared, but still hard enough to jar him in his seat.  Atet bounces once then slides into a long skid.

Frantically working the controls before him, he quickly realizes there's nothing he can do about the skid and throws his hands in the air in frustration.  Instead he turns his eyes back to the view port and uttering a soft prayer that the ship will stop before reaching the village.

It's not until Atet smashes through a dozen or more trees from a small cluster of trees that the ship finally comes to rest.

[img[images/Oasis2.png]]

Ra's pulse continues to pound, all three of his hearts working frantically while he attempts to will himself calm. 

His eyes return to the village again, much closer than he had intended, but still perhaps a quarter mild distant.  //Greetings first, then I can figure out how badly Atet has been damaged,//  His face creases unhappily, //I should have inspected the ship before trying to land, I should have anticipated that there may be troubles after the damage she sustained during
passages.content_zh:

他從來沒有學會如何正確地掌握控制裝置。  船的速度很好，軌跡看起來也正確，但如果沒有合適的起落架，他知道這將是一次艱難的著陸。

在地面上，透過觀察口，他可以看到阿特的影子投在船下的大地上。  當他接近地面時，太陽在他的背後。  在他落地前幾秒鐘，喇叭就發出鳴響，警告乘客，或者在這種情況下是船上唯一的乘客，即將發生墜機。

就在那一瞬間，他的眼睛在前方閃爍，看到了他為第一次與這個種族的成員會面而選擇的小村莊。  但他還來不及思考他們所看到的一切，他的注意力就被迫回到了自己的困境。

飛船撞到了地面，雖然沒有拉擔心的那麼猛烈，但仍然足以讓他在座位上晃動。  阿特彈跳一次，然後滑入長滑道。

他瘋狂地操作著面前的控制裝置，很快意識到自己對打滑無能為力，沮喪地舉起雙手。  相反，他將目光轉回觀景口，輕聲祈禱船能在到達村莊之前停下來。

直到阿特將一小群樹中的十幾棵或更多棵樹撞碎後，船終於停了下來。

拉的脈搏繼續跳動，他的三顆心臟都在瘋狂地運轉，同時他試圖讓自己平靜下來。

passages.name: Q4S1
passages.content:
Tilting his wings again, Ra allows himself to fall into a gradual dive, circling as he loses altitude.  He revels in the feeling of the wind rushing around his body, the way it moves around his wings and across his feathers.  

//I hope that I never loose the wonder in this feeling of flight,//  He thinks before his mind starts to focus on the ground rushing to meet him.  Mere seconds from the ground, he spreads his wings wide and angles them to catch the air, his descent slowing with a thunderous sound as he approaches the ground, his taloned feet touching the ground right as he starts to change into his reptilian form.

Instead of changing to full crocodile, Ra instead assumes his half form, becoming a towering mass of muscle and thick hide as he walks toward his destination.  As he walks, his head swivels from side to side, searching his surroundings for any sign of danger.

He begins to see damage to the nearby trees, like massive claws, claws larger than anything he has witnessed on this world, have left furrows in large trees and have toppled smaller ones.  His pace slows, his eyes drifting to the path he is following where he sees a huge footprint that dwarfs his own.

passages.content:
The meadow is large, much larger than it had looked from the air.

An uneasy feeling settles in the pit of Ra's stomach, //Something is not right here, more so than the computer suggested.//  A chill overcomes him, seeping into his bones, //I feel like I'm standing inside of a rift.//

The plants, while numerous are pale and tinged with patches of brown that make them look as if they are dying, and not even the insects dare make a sound.

Pausing, Ra takes in his surroundings, from the glassy still pond at the center of the meadow, it's water blacker than the darkest night, to the clouds overhead moving faster than they should be able.

And in that second, Ra feels as if his legs turn to jelly, terror washing through him in a wave that threatens to overwhelm him, //I'm inside a rift.//

//'Ra?'// A voice calls from the too-still water, a voice he knows can not actually be calling out to him.  The sound of the voice echoes in his head.  //She's dead, they're all dead,//  Ra thinks frantically, knowing deep down that the voice is more a projection inside of his mind than any audible sound, //'Ra, please, save me!  Save US'//  The voice beckons again, but this time it is joined by the voices of everyone he ever knew from his home world, . . . . every dead friend, every dead person he ever bonded with, . . . . . every dead child he helped give life.

His cry is stillborn on his lips as he forces it back, knowing that making even the smallest sound may bring about his end.

Carefully, he takes a step back, his eyes never leaving the still black water before him, //If I can get to the Atet, I can scan the area, find the runes that hold this gate open, destroy them.//

His frantic thoughts come to an abrupt end however when he hears something behind him, like a force of nature moving across the ground at a slow but inevitable pace.

Very slowly, Ra turns his head.  Behind him is a reptilian creature, massive in size with a gaping maw of razor sharp teeth that couple shred

passages.name: Q4Middle2
passages.content:
The first thing that registers for Ra is surprise.  Surprise to still be alive.

Opening his eyes slowly, he discovers that he is in the same place as he was when he lost consciousness.  Deep in his chest, he can feel the damage from earlier, broken ribs, torn muscles, and other things.  The filth in his core however, the corruption he can feel in the center of his being, that proves far more troubling to him  //The wounds can heal given time,//  Ra thinks, trying to take stock of his options instead of allowing his thoughts to linger on the corruption he can feel twisting like a snake in the pit of his stomach.  

None of them are good.  

//In my current condition, I might be able to run, but it's going to hurt like hell.  It might be wiser to attempt leaving subtly, to try avoiding unwanted attention.//

Ra's eyes turn to the waters nearby, the perfectly still surface, and the never ending whispers of his fallen loved ones.  

[[Make a run for it.|Q4Run]]

[[Sneak away.|Q4Sneak]]

[[Approach the water.|Q4Drown]]

passages.name: Ship Tour
passages.content:
Ra shows her around the ship a little bit.  It's clear that she's amazed by what she is seeing, but uncomprehending of the significance of any of it.

When he reaches the modest crew quarters, he looks at the room, a simple bed, a desk folded out from the wall, and a few simple trinkets remaining from a former inhabitant.  

//I guess in a way, this is my home now,// Ra thinks, the thought sobering his mood significantly.

He starts to turn, seeing Hathor looking him in the eye as he looks toward her.  She's standing very close.  His body reacts with surprise, his skin flaring nearly white for a split second before settling into a slightly darker shade of blue than usual.  

Her eyes never leave his own, one hand coming up and sliding the strap of her dress off her shoulder.  With the same hand she reaches across to do the same with the other side.  The dress seems to fall in slow motion, pooling around her feet.

[[Allow this to continue.|Hathor first bedding.]]

[[Brush off her advances.|Hathor first denied.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉帶她參觀了一下船。  很明顯，她對自己所看到的感到驚訝，但不理解其中的意義。

當他到達簡陋的船員宿舍時，他看了看房間，一張簡單的床，一張從牆上折疊起來的桌子，還有一些前居民留下的簡單小飾品。  

//我想在某種程度上，這就是我現在的家了，//Ra想道，這個想法讓他的情緒明顯清醒了。

他開始轉身，看到哈索爾看著他的眼睛，同時他也看向她。  她站得很近。  他的身體做出了驚訝的反應，他的皮膚有一瞬間幾乎變白，然後變成了比平常稍深的藍色。  

她的目光從未離開過他的眼睛，一隻手抬起來，將裙子的帶子從肩上滑下來。  她用同一隻手伸過去，對另一側做同樣的事情。  裙子似乎以慢動作落下，落在她的腳邊。

[[讓這一切繼續下去。 |哈索爾第一個寢具。 ]]

passages.name: Q5H1
passages.content:
To the people directly around him, Ra calls out, "Listen for me, I will call you to where you are most needed,"  Then without any further word, Ra jumps, his body rapidly morphing into a bird before he can reach the apex of his jump, then his wings flapping to drive him into the sky.

Ra's falcon cry fills the evening air as he surveys the battle playing out beneath him.  He sees a ghoul burst from the sands near the base of the nearest pyramid, //They've been slumbering right beneath the feet of those working on the pyramids,//  He realizes grimly.

//There are dozens of the things,//  Ra realizes, crying out again to gain the attention of those below, then diving toward the most desperate of the fighting.  The guardsmen surge forward, rushing to battle in his wake.  As the battle is joined, the sudden addition of extra combatants allows those already there to not only hold their ground, but to push forward.

Wheeling in the air, he rises high above to survey the battle again, seeking out anywhere else that the combatants might need help.  Each time he sees a place that the fighting is going poorly, he cries out in the night, drawing combatants to where they are needed, each time tilting the battle in the guardsmen favor.  

Ra is just ready to sigh with relief as he skims the scaffolding against one of the pyramids, when he is suddenly knocked from the air by something far larger than his avian form.  Ra twirls in the air, he tries to steady his flight, only to realize that one wing is mangled and useless at his side.

The wind is knocked from his lungs as he slams into the side of the pyramid, skidding down it's side a ways before he starts to slow.  Willing himself to change rapidly, Ra returns himself to his natural form, barely suppressing the scream that threatens to pass his lips at such a rapid change.

Frantically, Ra looks around, seeing three ghouls rapidly climbing the pyramid toward him.  When he sees the scaffolding nearby, he already knows that he'll
passages.content_zh:
拉對著他周圍的人喊道：「聽我說，我會召喚你們到最需要你們的地方。」然後，沒有再多說什麼，拉跳了起來，在他到達跳躍的頂點之前，他的身體迅速變成了一隻鳥，然後他的翅膀拍動著，把他帶上了天空。

當拉觀察腳下正在上演的戰鬥時，夜空中充滿了獵鷹般的叫聲。  他看到一個食屍鬼從最近的金字塔底部附近的沙子裡衝出來，//他們一直在金字塔上工作的人的腳下沉睡，//他冷酷地意識到。

//有幾十種東西，//拉意識到，再次大聲喊叫以引起下面那些人的注意，然後衝向最絕望的戰鬥。  衛兵們向前衝去，在他身後衝向戰鬥。  隨著戰鬥的進行，突然增加的額外戰鬥人員不僅可以讓已經在那裡的人堅守陣地，而且可以向前推進。

他在空中旋轉，升到高空再次審視戰鬥，尋找戰鬥人員可能需要幫助的任何地方。  每次看到戰鬥進展不順利的地方，他都會在夜裡大聲喊叫，將戰鬥人員吸引到需要他們的地方，每次都使戰鬥向有利於衛兵的方向傾斜。  

當拉掠過一座金字塔的鷹架時，他正準備鬆口氣，突然被一個比他的鳥類形態大得多的東西從空中撞倒。  拉在空中旋轉，他試圖穩定自己的飛行，卻發現他身邊的一隻翅膀已損壞且毫無用處。

當他撞上金字塔的一側時，風從他的肺部被吹走，在他開始減速之前沿著金字塔的一側滑行了一段距離。  拉願意讓自己迅速改變，他讓自己恢復到自然形態，在如此迅速的變化下，他勉強壓抑著即將從唇邊發出的尖叫聲。

拉瘋狂地環顧四周，看到三個食屍鬼迅速爬上金字塔朝他走來。  當他看到附近的鷹架時，他就知道他會

passages.name: Amun Meet
passages.content:
For the next hour Ra visits the temple while platters of food are placed before him be scantly clad people fawn over him.  All the while Amun and Ra exchange subtle barbs with one another.  All the while Ra's eyes drift over the interior, reading the engravings, //If I did not know better, I would say this temple was created for him rather than dedicated to the Gods.//

He samples a few more items while his thoughts wander,

//I should be going soon,//  Ra thinks to himself, //This man craves power, and it is clear that he sees me as some form of rival, but I do not believe him to be dangerous to me or our people.  I do not have to like this man, but I will show him respect until such a time as he proves himself unworthy.//

Standing, "Amun, it has been a great pleasure to meet you,"  Ra begins.

Amun looks at Ra with an expression that suggests he is thinking 'Of course it is.'

[img[images/aa.png]]

Ra feels another momentary urge to throttle the man but quickly stomps it down before forcing himself to add, "And I look forward to our next opportunity to visit.

Again, Amun smiles with that smile that does not quite touch his eyes, "Great and mighty Ra, you are welcome here always.  When next you return, we will hold a feast in your honor, and the services of this temple are yours to sample as you desire,"  He gestures at the men and women who have been serving them, every one of them beautiful by human standards.

A few minutes later, Ra steps back out into the street, finding far more people gathered there than when he first entered.  

//Why do I feel like Amun will find some way to use my visit for his gain?//  He barely has time to finish the thought before he hears someone among the milling crowd , "That's him,"  Followed by another voice, "Ra himself sought out Amun's temple,"  And another, "Laying with someone who laid with a God, . . . "  

Ra looses track of what people are saying,the den of noise making it difficult to follow more than a few words at a t
passages.content_zh:
在接下來的一個小時裡，拉參觀了神廟，他面前擺放著一盤盤食物，衣著暴露的人們對他阿諛奉承。  阿蒙和拉一直在互相微妙地互相諷刺。  拉的眼睛一直在內部移動，閱讀雕刻，//如果我不知道更多，我會說這座寺廟是為他創建的，而不是獻給眾神的。 //

當他的思緒遊離時，他又品嚐了一些東西，

//我應該很快就走，//拉心裡想，//這個人渴望權力，很明顯他將我視為某種形式的競爭對手，但我不相信他對我或我們的人民有危險。  我不必喜歡這個人，但我會尊重他，直到他證明自己不值得為止。 //

站起來，「阿蒙，很高興見到你，」拉開始說道。

阿蒙看著拉，他的表情表明他正在思考“當然是這樣。”

[img[圖/aa.png]]

拉突然有一種想要掐死這個人的衝動，但很快就被壓了下來，然後強迫自己補充道：「我期待著我們下一次拜訪的機會。

阿蒙再一次微笑著，笑容沒有觸及他的眼睛，「偉大而強大的拉，這裡永遠歡迎你。  當你下次回來時，我們將為你舉辦一場盛宴，這座寺廟的服務由你來品嚐，如你所願。 「他指著一直為他們服務的男女，按照人類的標準，他們每個人都是美麗的。

幾分鐘後，拉回到街上，發現聚集的人比第一次進來時多得多。  

//為什麼我覺得阿蒙會想辦法利用我的來訪來謀取利益？ //他還來不及完成這個想法，就聽到擁擠的人群中有人，「那就是他，」接著是另一個聲音，「拉本人找到了阿蒙的神廟，」還有另一個聲音，「與一個與神同床的人同床，... 。 。 」

Ra 無法聽清人們在說什麼，噪音的巢穴使得在時間裡很難聽懂更多的單字

passages.name: Bastet Ignore.
passages.content:
//So many of these felines, and held in such high regard,//  He shrugs to himself and begins to walk away, heedless of the cat's desire for attention.

He's nearly forgotten about the small black feline when he decides to tap into the new genetic code now stored in his body.  

The change washes over him slowly, short black hair sprouting across his skin.  His face pulls out as long whiskers fan out from his nose.  A soft hiss escapes his lips, his lips pulling back to expose a mouth full of feline teeth.  At the same time, his eyes change, narrowing to slits while the surrounding orbs become a deep gold.

With his feline eyes, every dark shadow seems brighter than he's used to.  //I could see well in the dark like this,// He thinks to himself.

Ra flexes and stretches, his body contorting in ways he's never been able to move before.  His feet shift, becoming paws, the nails at the tips of his toes pushing forward to scratch at the sandstone floor.  Meanwhile, bur breaks out across the back of his hands his fingernails hardening and pulling into points before he stops the change in that area.

From his chest, he can see breasts, swollen and full.  He wonders briefly if perhaps the cat that touched him was pregnant, knowing that sometimes such things can manifest in transformations on rare occasion.

[img[images/Ra-bas.png]]

As if to confirm the feminine nature of the feline, he legs his hand stray to his crotch, finding a damp cleft where he would expect a penis from a male of this world.

He allows himself a moment longer to admire his changes, then he shifts back to his natural form and makes his way back toward the temple entrance.

當他決定利用現在儲存在他體內的新遺傳密碼時，他幾乎忘記了這隻黑色小貓。  

變化慢慢地席捲了他，黑色的短髮在他的皮膚上長出。  他的臉拉長，長長的鬍鬚從鼻子上扇形展開。  他的嘴唇發出一聲輕柔的嘶嘶聲，他的嘴唇向後拉，露出一張滿是貓牙的嘴。  同時，他的雙眼也發生了變化，瞇成了一條縫，周圍的眼珠也變成了深金色。

在他貓般的眼睛裡，每一個黑影都比他以前看到的更加明亮。  //像這樣我在黑暗中看得很清楚，//他心裡想。

Ra 彎曲和伸展，他的身體以他以前從未能夠移動的方式扭曲。  他的雙腳移動，變成了爪子，腳趾尖的指甲向前推進，在砂岩地板上刮擦。  同時，在他停止該區域的變化之前，布爾的手背上突然出現了他的指甲變硬並拉成點的情況。

從他的胸部，他可以看到乳房，腫脹而飽滿。  他短暫地想知道觸摸他的貓是否懷孕了，因為他知道有時這種事情會在極少數情況下以轉變的形式顯現出來。

他讓自己多待了一會兒欣賞自己的變化，然後變回自然形態，朝著寺廟入口走去。

passages.name: Visit the Temple of Amun.
passages.content:
<<if $Story5 gte 5 and $Story5 lte 6>>After seeing Amun's guards in the street around the temple district, Ra feels compelled to seek the man out, to discover if Amun might know something of value.

Ra is just entering the courtyard when he sees Amun near the far side.  The short man doesn't seem to notice Ra right away, but Ra knows that will change as he crosses the courtyard, skirting the edge of the fountain, at a ground eating pace.

"We need to talk,"  Ra says, "In private."

"We do,"  Amun agrees, leading Ra further into the temple without uttering a word.

[[Thank Amun for having his guards protect the temple district.|Fifth Quest Part One 2]]

[[Confront Amin about having his guards protect the temple district.|Fifth Quest Part One 3]]

<<else>><<set $random to random(1,3)>><<if $random is 1>>When Ra enters the temple courtyard, he pauses, letting his eyes drift over the interior.  He can't help but marvel at the craftsmanship of the place and the simple beauty of the people gathered.

[img[images/Egypt1.png]]

His reprieve is interrupted however when he sees someone on the other side of the courtyard moving quickly in his direction.  //Amun,//  Ra realizes as the short man strides toward him with a commanding stride, //One would think he would appear more rushed given his short legs and stature.//

With barely an incline of his head, Amun greets Ra, "Welcome Ra, God of the sun, to this temple.  You honor us with your presence."

//And his tone is only a little condescending,// Ra nods in acknowledgment of Amun's words.

Amun's expression sours slightly, "We shall prepare a feast in your honor,"  He declares loudly enough to ensure half of the courtyard heard his words, "We are truly favored to have the mighty Ra visit us once more."

[img[images/aa.png]]

Ra sighs inwardly but is careful not to show any sign of his displeasure at how the man is behaving, //I do not know that I've ever met someone so arrogant in my life, or someone who is so good at using i

passages.name: Q6B1
passages.content:
Faster than any time he has ever transformed before, Ra forces the change.  Every inch of his body is engulfed in fiery white pain that fades nearly as fast as it starts.

As he takes the Bukavac form, he can feel the corruption coursing through his veins, intoxicating, powerful, and so very wrong that a part of him is nearly sick.

Nyarlathotep smiles, reaching out with one hand, "Still,"  He purrs.

Ra does as he is told, instantly calming.

"You belong to me now,"  As the words leave his mouth, his hand comes to rest on Ra's cheek.  

The moment of contact changes //everything.//  In the blink of an eye, Ra's whole world changes, his perceptions, his hopes, his dreams.  All to be replaced by a cold certainty that whatever Nyarlathotep wants, that will henceforth be his most sincere desire.

Nyarlathotep pats Ra on the head as if his hulking form is nothing more than a well trained dog, "A pity, but I suppose I can always use another pet.

END.



Or perhaps you would prefer to return to the Atet as if this never happened?

[[Return to the Atet.|Entering Sandbox.]]
passages.content_zh:
拉強制改變的速度比以往任何時候都快。  他身體的每一寸都被熾熱的白色疼痛所吞噬，這種疼痛幾乎和開始時一樣快地消失了。

當他變成布卡瓦克形態時，他能感覺到腐敗在他的血管中流淌，令人陶醉，強大，而且非常錯誤，以至於他的一部分幾乎生病了。

passages.content:
An hour later, Ra steps foot on the Atet.  Hathor quickly comes around the corner, a sense of urgency about her.  She doesn't even ask how things went, the question is so clear in her eyes that she doesn't need to say a word.

She sighs when she sees Ra's grim expression.

Ra considers his words before speaking, "The immediate risk has moved on,"  He says carefully.

With his thoughts consumed by the night's events, Ra sits at the ship's console as he considers how to proceed.
